```{r eval=FALSE}
# Calcular el sesgo por rangos de score
sesgo_analysis <- resultados_rf$test_predictions %>%
  mutate(score_group = cut(actual_score, 
                          breaks = quantile(actual_score, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.2)),
                          include.lowest = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(visit, score_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_actual = mean(actual_score),
    mean_predicted = mean(predicted_score),
    mean_residual = mean(residual),
    bias_ratio = mean_predicted / mean_actual,
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(sesgo_analysis)

# Función para corregir predicciones basada en el sesgo observado
corregir_predicciones <- function(predictions_df) {
  
  # Modelar la relación residual vs actual
  correction_models <- list()
  
  for(v in unique(predictions_df$visit)) {
    visit_data <- predictions_df %>% filter(visit == v)
    
    # Ajustar modelo lineal para corregir sesgo
    correction_model <- lm(residual ~ actual_score, data = visit_data)
    correction_models[[v]] <- correction_model
  }
  
  # Aplicar corrección
  predictions_corregidas <- predictions_df %>%
    group_by(visit) %>%
    mutate(
      # Predecir el sesgo esperado
      sesgo_esperado = predict(correction_models[[unique(visit)]], 
                              newdata = data.frame(actual_score = predicted_score)),
      # Ajustar la predicción
      predicted_score_corregido = predicted_score + sesgo_esperado,
      residual_corregido = actual_score - predicted_score_corregido
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  return(list(
    predictions_corregidas = predictions_corregidas,
    correction_models = correction_models
  ))
}

# Aplicar corrección
resultados_corregidos <- corregir_predicciones(resultados_rf$test_predictions)

comparar_metricas <- function(original, corregido) {
  metricas_original <- original %>%
    group_by(visit) %>%
    summarise(
      rmse_original = sqrt(mean(residual^2)),
      mae_original = mean(abs(residual)),
      r2_original = cor(actual_score, predicted_score)^2,
      bias_original = mean(residual)
    )
  
  metricas_corregido <- corregido %>%
    group_by(visit) %>%
    summarise(
      rmse_corregido = sqrt(mean(residual_corregido^2)),
      mae_corregido = mean(abs(residual_corregido)),
      r2_corregido = cor(actual_score, predicted_score_corregido)^2,
      bias_corregido = mean(residual_corregido)
    )
  
  left_join(metricas_original, metricas_corregido, by = "visit")
}

metricas_comparacion <- comparar_metricas(
  resultados_rf$test_predictions,
  resultados_corregidos$predictions_corregidas
)
print(metricas_comparacion)


# Gráfico comparativo de residuos
df_comparativo <- bind_rows(
  resultados_rf$test_predictions %>%
    mutate(tipo = "Original", residual = actual_score - predicted_score),
  resultados_corregidos$predictions_corregidas %>%
    mutate(tipo = "Corregido", residual = residual_corregido)
)

ggplot(df_comparativo, aes(x = actual_score, y = residual, color = tipo)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ visit) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Comparación de Residuos: Original vs Corregido",
    subtitle = "La pendiente positiva indica el sesgo que estamos corrigiendo"
  )

# Función mejorada de interpretación
interpretar_sesgo_positivo <- function(rf_results) {
  predictions <- rf_results$test_predictions
  
  # Analizar la pendiente por visita
  pendientes <- predictions %>%
    group_by(visit) %>%
    summarise(
      pendiente_residual = lm(residual ~ actual_score)$coefficient[2],
      p_value = summary(lm(residual ~ actual_score))$coefficient[2,4],
      intercepto = lm(residual ~ actual_score)$coefficient[1]
    )
  
  # Interpretación cualitativa
  interpretacion <- pendientes %>%
    mutate(
      direccion_sesgo = ifelse(pendiente_residual > 0, 
                              "SUBESTIMACIÓN progresiva en scores altos", 
                              "SOBREESTIMACIÓN progresiva en scores altos"),
      significancia = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "Estadísticamente significativo", "No significativo"),
      recomendacion = ifelse(pendiente_residual > 0 & p_value < 0.05,
                           "Considerar transformación de variables o ajuste post-predicción",
                           "El sesgo no requiere corrección urgente")
    )
  
  return(list(
    analisis_pendientes = pendientes,
    interpretacion = interpretacion
  ))
}

# Aplicar interpretación
interpretacion <- interpretar_sesgo_positivo(resultados_rf)
print(interpretacion$interpretacion)




# Función para análisis multivariable con Random Forest MEJORADA
analisis_multivariable_rf_mejorado <- function(
    expression_data, 
    clinical_data,
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw", 
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
    alpha = 0.05,
    cohort_name = "training",
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 4,
    preprocess = TRUE,
    max_features = 500,
    importance_type = "permutation",
    test_fraction = 0.3,
    n_bootstrap = 10,
    transform_target = FALSE,      # NUEVO: transformar variable target
    transformation_type = "log",   # NUEVO: tipo de transformación
    weighted = FALSE,              # NUEVO: usar pesos
    weight_type = "inverse_error"  # NUEVO: tipo de ponderación
) {
  
  required_packages <- c("dplyr", "broom", "ranger", "caret", "doParallel", "foreach", "tidyr")
  for (pkg in required_packages) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  expression_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
  
  combined_data <- clinical_data %>%
    inner_join(expression_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas)
  
  results <- list()
  models <- list()
  model_data <- list()
  test_predictions <- list()
  feature_importance <- list()
  transformation_info <- list()  # NUEVO: guardar info de transformación
  
  for (v in visitas) {
    df_visit <- combined_data %>% 
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", 
                           setdiff(colnames(expression_processed), "participant_id")))) %>%
      na.omit()
    
    if (nrow(df_visit) < 20) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    X <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id"))))
    y_original <- df_visit[[score_col]]  # NUEVO: guardar original
    y <- y_original
    
    # NUEVO: Transformación de la variable target
    transformation_applied <- "none"
    if (transform_target) {
      if (transformation_type == "log") {
        # Verificar que todos los valores sean positivos para log
        if (all(y_original >= 0)) {
          y <- log(y_original + 1)
          transformation_applied <- "log"
        } else {
          warning(paste("No se puede aplicar log a visita", v, "- valores negativos presentes"))
        }
      } else if (transformation_type == "sqrt") {
        # Verificar que todos los valores sean no negativos para sqrt
        if (all(y_original >= 0)) {
          y <- sqrt(y_original)
          transformation_applied <- "sqrt"
        } else {
          warning(paste("No se puede aplicar sqrt a visita", v, "- valores negativos presentes"))
        }
      } else if (transformation_type == "boxcox") {
        # Transformación Box-Cox (requiere valores positivos)
        if (all(y_original > 0)) {
          bc <- MASS::boxcox(y_original ~ 1)
          lambda <- bc$x[which.max(bc$y)]
          y <- (y_original^lambda - 1) / lambda
          transformation_applied <- paste0("boxcox(lambda=", round(lambda, 3), ")")
        } else {
          warning(paste("No se puede aplicar Box-Cox a visita", v, "- valores no positivos presentes"))
        }
      }
    }
    
    # NUEVO: Guardar información de transformación
    transformation_info[[v]] <- list(
      original_mean = mean(y_original),
      original_sd = sd(y_original),
      transformed_mean = if(transform_target) mean(y) else mean(y_original),
      transformed_sd = if(transform_target) sd(y) else sd(y_original),
      transformation = transformation_applied
    )
    
    if (preprocess) {
      # Eliminar predictores de varianza casi cero
      nzv <- nearZeroVar(X)
      if (length(nzv) > 0 && length(nzv) < ncol(X)) {
        X <- X[, -nzv]
      }
      # Eliminar predictores altamente correlacionados
      if (ncol(X) > 2) {
        high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor(X), cutoff = 0.95)
        if (length(high_corr) > 0 && length(high_corr) < ncol(X)) {
          X <- X[, -high_corr]
        }
      }
    }
    
    # ---- Split train/test ----
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)
    
    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    y_train_original <- y_original[train_idx]  # NUEVO: guardar original para pesos
    X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- y[test_idx]
    y_test_original <- y_original[test_idx]    # NUEVO: guardar original para pesos
    
    feature_names <- colnames(X_train)
    
    # NUEVO: Calcular pesos si se solicita
    case_weights <- NULL
    if (weighted) {
      if (weight_type == "inverse_error") {
        # Pesos inversamente proporcionales al error esperado (basado en sesgo observado)
        expected_error <- 1 / (1 + abs(y_train_original - mean(y_train_original)))
        case_weights <- expected_error / mean(expected_error)  # Normalizar
      } else if (weight_type == "inverse_variance") {
        # Pesos basados en la varianza (para heterocedasticidad)
        case_weights <- 1 / (1 + (y_train_original - mean(y_train_original))^2)
        case_weights <- case_weights / mean(case_weights)  # Normalizar
      } else if (weight_type == "balanced") {
        # Balancear por cuartiles del score
        quantiles <- quantile(y_train_original, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.25))
        weight_groups <- cut(y_train_original, breaks = quantiles, include.lowest = TRUE)
        group_counts <- table(weight_groups)
        case_weights <- 1 / as.numeric(group_counts[weight_groups])
        case_weights <- case_weights / mean(case_weights)  # Normalizar
      }
    }
    
    # ---- Random Forest ajustado ----
    rf_args <- list(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      num.trees = n_trees,
      mtry = min(50, ncol(X_train)),
      min.node.size = 5,
      sample.fraction = 0.7,
      importance = importance_type,
      verbose = FALSE,
      num.threads = n_cores
    )
    
    # NUEVO: Añadir pesos si están definidos
    if (!is.null(case_weights)) {
      rf_args$case.weights <- case_weights
    }
    
    final_model <- do.call(ranger, rf_args)
    
    # Predicciones sobre test
    test_pred_transformed <- predict(final_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions
    
    # NUEVO: Revertir transformación si se aplicó
    if (transform_target) {
      if (transformation_type == "log") {
        test_pred <- exp(test_pred_transformed) - 1
      } else if (transformation_type == "sqrt") {
        test_pred <- test_pred_transformed^2
      } else if (transformation_type == "boxcox") {
        # Revertir Box-Cox (aproximación)
        lambda <- as.numeric(gsub(".*lambda=([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", transformation_applied))
        test_pred <- (test_pred_transformed * lambda + 1)^(1/lambda)
      }
    } else {
      test_pred <- test_pred_transformed
    }
    
    test_predictions[[v]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id[test_idx],
      sample_id = df_visit$sample_id[test_idx],
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = y_test_original,
      predicted_score = as.numeric(test_pred),
      predicted_score_transformed = if(transform_target) as.numeric(test_pred_transformed) else NA,
      transformation = transformation_applied,
      weighted = weighted,
      weight_type = if(weighted) weight_type else "none",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    actual <- y_test_original
    predicted <- as.numeric(test_pred)
    
    rmse_final <- sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2))
    mae_final <- mean(abs(actual - predicted))
    r2_final <- cor(actual, predicted)^2
    
    # Importancia de features
    if (!is.null(final_model$variable.importance)) {
      imp <- final_model$variable.importance
      imp_df <- data.frame(
        feature = names(imp),
        importance = imp,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ) %>%
        arrange(desc(importance))
      feature_importance[[v]] <- imp_df
    }
    
    # ---- Validación bootstrap sobre test ----
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind, 
                                .packages = c("ranger", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
      set.seed(123 + i)
      train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
      test_idx  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)
      
      X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- y[train_idx]
      y_train_original_local <- y_original[train_idx]
      X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_test  <- y[test_idx]
      y_test_original_local <- y_original[test_idx]
      
      # NUEVO: Calcular pesos para bootstrap
      bootstrap_weights <- NULL
      if (weighted) {
        if (weight_type == "inverse_error") {
          expected_error <- 1 / (1 + abs(y_train_original_local - mean(y_train_original_local)))
          bootstrap_weights <- expected_error / mean(expected_error)
        }
      }
      
      rf_args_bootstrap <- list(
        x = X_train,
        y = y_train,
        num.trees = n_trees,
        mtry = min(50, ncol(X_train)),
        min.node.size = 5,
        sample.fraction = 0.7,
        importance = "none",
        verbose = FALSE
      )
      
      if (!is.null(bootstrap_weights)) {
        rf_args_bootstrap$case.weights <- bootstrap_weights
      }
      
      rf_fit <- do.call(ranger, rf_args_bootstrap)
      
      pred_transformed <- predict(rf_fit, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions
      
      # NUEVO: Revertir transformación
      if (transform_target) {
        if (transformation_type == "log") {
          pred <- exp(pred_transformed) - 1
        } else if (transformation_type == "sqrt") {
          pred <- pred_transformed^2
        } else if (transformation_type == "boxcox") {
          lambda <- as.numeric(gsub(".*lambda=([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", transformation_applied))
          pred <- (pred_transformed * lambda + 1)^(1/lambda)
        }
      } else {
        pred <- pred_transformed
      }
      
      actual_local <- y_test_original_local
      
      rmse <- sqrt(mean((actual_local - pred)^2))
      mae <- mean(abs(actual_local - pred))
      r2 <- cor(actual_local, pred)^2
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        rmse = rmse,
        mae = mae,
        r2 = r2,
        n_train = length(train_idx),
        n_test = length(test_idx)
      )
    }
    
    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_train = length(train_idx),
      n_test = length(test_idx),
      n_features = ncol(X),
      rmse = rmse_final,
      mae = mae_final,
      r2 = r2_final,
      transformation = transformation_applied,
      weighted = weighted,
      bootstrap_results = bootstrap_results
    )
    
    models[[v]] <- final_model
    model_data[[v]] <- list(
      X_train = X_train, y_train = y_train,
      X_test = X_test, y_test = y_test,
      participant_ids = df_visit$participant_id,
      feature_names = feature_names,
      case_weights = case_weights,
      transformation = transformation_applied
    )
  }
  
  all_test_predictions <- bind_rows(test_predictions)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
    n_train = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_train),
    n_test = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_test),
    n_features = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_features),
    rmse = sapply(results, function(x) x$rmse),
    mae = sapply(results, function(x) x$mae),
    r2 = sapply(results, function(x) x$r2),
    transformation = sapply(results, function(x) x$transformation),
    weighted = sapply(results, function(x) x$weighted),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  return(list(
    models = models,
    model_data = model_data,
    test_predictions = all_test_predictions,
    summary = summary_df,
    detailed_results = results,
    feature_importance = feature_importance,
    transformation_info = transformation_info,  # NUEVO
    target = score_col,
    cohort_name = cohort_name,
    parameters = list(
      transform_target = transform_target,
      transformation_type = transformation_type,
      weighted = weighted,
      weight_type = weight_type
    )
  ))
}


# Función para comparar múltiples configuraciones
comparar_estrategias <- function(expression_data, clinical_data, 
                                 score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
                                 visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")) {
  
  estrategias <- list(
    list(name = "Original", transform_target = FALSE, weighted = FALSE),
    list(name = "Log_Transform", transform_target = TRUE, transformation_type = "log", weighted = FALSE),
    list(name = "Sqrt_Transform", transform_target = TRUE, transformation_type = "sqrt", weighted = FALSE),
    list(name = "Weighted", transform_target = FALSE, weighted = TRUE, weight_type = "inverse_error"),
    list(name = "Log_Weighted", transform_target = TRUE, transformation_type = "log", 
         weighted = TRUE, weight_type = "inverse_error")
  )
  
  resultados_comparacion <- list()
  
  for (estrategia in estrategias) {
    cat("Ejecutando estrategia:", estrategia$name, "\n")
    
    resultado <- do.call(analisis_multivariable_rf_mejorado, c(
      list(
        expression_data = expression_data,
        clinical_data = clinical_data,
        score_col = score_col,
        visitas = visitas,
        cohort_name = estrategia$name
      ),
      estrategia[-1]  # excluir el nombre
    ))
    
    resultados_comparacion[[estrategia$name]] <- resultado
  }
  
  return(resultados_comparacion)
}

# Función para analizar la comparación
analizar_comparacion <- function(resultados_comparacion) {
  comparacion_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (nombre in names(resultados_comparacion)) {
    res <- resultados_comparacion[[nombre]]
    summary <- res$summary %>%
      mutate(estrategia = nombre)
    comparacion_df <- bind_rows(comparacion_df, summary)
  }
  
  # Calcular mejora relativa vs estrategia original
  original_metrics <- comparacion_df %>%
    filter(estrategia == "Original") %>%
    select(visit, rmse_original = rmse, mae_original = mae, r2_original = r2)
  
  comparacion_df <- comparacion_df %>%
    left_join(original_metrics, by = "visit") %>%
    mutate(
      rmse_improvement = (rmse_original - rmse) / rmse_original * 100,
      mae_improvement = (mae_original - mae) / mae_original * 100,
      r2_improvement = (r2 - r2_original) / r2_original * 100
    )
  
  return(comparacion_df)
}

# 1. Probar diferentes estrategias
resultados_comparativos <- comparar_estrategias(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_p,
  clinical_data = Covariates_score,
  score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
  visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
)

# 2. Analizar comparación
comparacion <- analizar_comparacion(resultados_comparativos)
print(comparacion)

# 3. Visualizar mejora
ggplot(comparacion, aes(x = visit, y = rmse_improvement, fill = estrategia)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Mejora en RMSE por Estrategia",
       y = "Mejora en RMSE (%)", x = "Visita")



# Estrategia definitiva basada en evidencia
resultados_definitivos <- analisis_multivariable_rf_mejorado(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_p,
  clinical_data = Covariates_score,
  score_col = "Motor_Score_raw", 
  visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
  transform_target = TRUE,
  transformation_type = "log",
  weighted = TRUE ,  # O TRUE si "Sqrt_Weighted" fue mejor
  weight_type = "inverse_error",
  cohort_name = "Modelo_Definitivo",
  n_trees = 500,
  n_cores = 8,
  test_fraction = 0.2
)

# Verificar mejora final
cat("=== RESULTADOS DEL MODELO DEFINITIVO ===\n")
print(resultados_definitivos$summary)

# Comparar con original
comparacion_final <- bind_rows(
  resultados_rf$summary %>% mutate(estrategia = "Original"),
  resultados_definitivos$summary %>% mutate(estrategia = "Definitivo")
)

ggplot(comparacion_final, aes(x = visit, y = r2, fill = estrategia)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Comparación Final: Original vs Definitivo",
       y = "R²", x = "Visita")

```



Igual que el anterior pero incluyendo medicación en el modelo


###### **Influencia de la medicación

```{r}

# Función corregida con búsqueda de mtry
analisis_multivariable_rf_optimizado <- function(
    expression_data,
    clinical_data,
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
    medication_vars = c("on_levodopa", "on_dopamine_agonist", "on_other_pd_medications"),
    cohort_name = "training",
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 4,
    preprocess = TRUE,
    test_fraction = 0.3,
    n_bootstrap = 25,
    mtry_strategy = "adaptive"  # "adaptive", "low", "high", "tune", "grid"
) {

  required_packages <- c("dplyr", "broom", "ranger", "caret", "doParallel", "foreach", "tidyr")
  for (pkg in required_packages) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  }

  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)

  # Función para búsqueda de mtry óptimo
  find_best_mtry <- function(X, y, mtry_candidates, n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2) {
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test <- y[test_idx]

    mtry_results <- data.frame()

    for (mtry_val in mtry_candidates) {
      rf_model <- ranger(
        x = X_train,
        y = y_train,
        num.trees = n_trees,
        mtry = mtry_val,
        min.node.size = 1,
        sample.fraction = 0.8,
        importance = "none",
        verbose = FALSE
      )

      pred <- predict(rf_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions
      rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test - pred)^2))

      mtry_results <- rbind(mtry_results,
                           data.frame(mtry = mtry_val, rmse = rmse))
    }

    # Seleccionar el mtry con menor RMSE
    best_mtry <- mtry_results$mtry[which.min(mtry_results$rmse)]
    return(best_mtry)
  }

  expression_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))

  # Preprocesar variables de medicación
  combined_data <- clinical_data %>%
    inner_join(expression_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(medication_vars),
                  ~ ifelse(. == "Yes", 1, 0)))

  available_med_vars <- medication_vars[medication_vars %in% colnames(combined_data)]
  medication_covariates <- if (length(available_med_vars) > 0) available_med_vars else NULL

  results <- list()
  models <- list()
  test_predictions <- list()
  feature_importance <- list()
  mtry_values <- list()
  mtry_candidates_used <- list()

  for (v in visitas) {
    df_visit <- combined_data %>%
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id",
                            medication_covariates,
                            setdiff(colnames(expression_processed), "participant_id")))) %>%
      na.omit()

    if (nrow(df_visit) < 20) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }

    # Preparar datos
    expression_vars <- setdiff(colnames(df_visit),
                              c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", medication_covariates))
    X_expr <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(all_of(expression_vars)))
    y <- df_visit[[score_col]]

    if (preprocess) {
      nzv <- nearZeroVar(X_expr)
      if (length(nzv) > 0 && length(nzv) < ncol(X_expr)) {
        X_expr <- X_expr[, -nzv]
      }
      if (ncol(X_expr) > 2) {
        high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor(X_expr), cutoff = 0.95)
        if (length(high_corr) > 0 && length(high_corr) < ncol(X_expr)) {
          X_expr <- X_expr[, -high_corr]
        }
      }
    }

    # Combinar expresión con medicación
    if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) {
      X_med <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(all_of(medication_covariates)))
      X <- cbind(X_expr, X_med)
    } else {
      X <- X_expr
    }

    # Estrategias de mtry - CON BÚSQUEDA DE MÚLTIPLES VALORES
    n_features <- ncol(X)
    n_med_vars <- ifelse(!is.null(medication_covariates), length(medication_covariates), 0)

    if (mtry_strategy == "low") {
      # Definir grid de valores bajos para probar
      base_mtry <- max(1, floor(sqrt(n_features)))
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
        base_mtry * 0.3,
        base_mtry * 0.5,
        base_mtry,
        base_mtry * 1.5,
        base_mtry * 2,
        base_mtry * 3
      ))))

      mtry_val <- find_best_mtry(X, y, mtry_candidates, n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2)

    } else if (mtry_strategy == "adaptive") {
      # Estrategia adaptativa con búsqueda
      base_mtry <- floor(sqrt(n_features))
      if (n_med_vars > 0) {
        mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.5),
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.7),
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.9),
          base_mtry,
          base_mtry * 1.2
        ))))
      } else {
        mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
          base_mtry * 0.5,
          base_mtry * 0.7,
          base_mtry,
          base_mtry * 1.2,
          base_mtry * 1.5
        ))))
      }
      mtry_val <- find_best_mtry(X, y, mtry_candidates, n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2)


    } else if (mtry_strategy == "high") {
      # Grid de valores altos
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
        floor(n_features * 0.1),
        floor(n_features * 0.2),
        floor(n_features * 0.3),
        floor(n_features * 0.4),
        floor(n_features * 0.5)
      ))))
      mtry_val <- find_best_mtry(X, y, mtry_candidates, n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2)

    } else if (mtry_strategy == "tune" || mtry_strategy == "grid") {
      # Búsqueda exhaustiva en grid
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(seq(
        from = max(1, floor(n_features * 0.05)),
        to = min(n_features, floor(n_features * 0.8)),
        length.out = 8
      ))))
      mtry_val <- find_best_mtry(X, y, mtry_candidates, n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2)

    } else {
      # Default: sqrt(n_features)
      mtry_val <- floor(sqrt(n_features))
      mtry_candidates <- mtry_val
    }


    mtry_values[[v]] <- mtry_val
    mtry_candidates_used[[v]] <- mtry_candidates

    message(paste("Visita", v, ": n_features =", n_features,
                 ", mtry_candidates =", paste(mtry_candidates, collapse = ", "),
                 ", best_mtry =", mtry_val,
                 ", medication_vars =", n_med_vars))

    # Split train/test para el modelo final
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- y[test_idx]

    # Random Forest con el mejor mtry encontrado
    final_model <- ranger(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      num.trees = n_trees,
      mtry = mtry_val,
      min.node.size = 5,
      sample.fraction = 0.8,
      importance = "none",
      verbose = FALSE,
      num.threads = n_cores,
      always.split.variables = if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) medication_covariates else NULL
    )

    # Predicciones y métricas
    test_pred <- predict(final_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions

    test_predictions[[v]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id[test_idx],
      sample_id = df_visit$sample_id[test_idx],
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = y_test,
      predicted_score = as.numeric(test_pred),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Bootstrap con el mejor mtry
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                                .packages = c("ranger", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
      set.seed(123 + i)
      train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
      test_idx  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

      X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- y[train_idx]
      X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_test  <- y[test_idx]

      rf_fit <- ranger(
        x = X_train,
        y = y_train,
        num.trees = n_trees,
        mtry = mtry_val,
        min.node.size = 5,
        sample.fraction = 0.8,
        importance = "none",
        verbose = FALSE,
        always.split.variables = if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) medication_covariates else NULL
      )

      pred <- predict(rf_fit, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions

      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        rmse = sqrt(mean((y_test - pred)^2)),
        mae = mean(abs(y_test - pred)),
        r2 = cor(y_test, pred)^2,
        n_train = length(train_idx),
        n_test = length(test_idx)
      )
    }

    actual <- y_test
    predicted <- as.numeric(test_pred)

    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_train = length(train_idx),
      n_test = length(test_idx),
      n_features = n_features,
      n_medication_vars = n_med_vars,
      mtry_candidates = mtry_candidates,
      mtry_used = mtry_val,
      rmse = sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2)),
      mae = mean(abs(actual - predicted)),
      r2 = cor(actual, predicted)^2,
      bootstrap_results = bootstrap_results
    )

    # Importancia de variables
    if (!is.null(final_model$variable.importance)) {
      imp <- final_model$variable.importance
      imp_df <- data.frame(
        feature = names(imp),
        importance = imp,
        type = ifelse(names(imp) %in% medication_covariates, "medication", "expression"),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ) %>% arrange(desc(importance))
      feature_importance[[v]] <- imp_df
    }
  }

  bootstrap_all <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) {
    if (!is.null(x$bootstrap_results)) {
      x$bootstrap_results$visit <- x$visit
      return(x$bootstrap_results)
    }
  }))

  return(list(
    models = models,
    test_predictions = bind_rows(test_predictions),
    summary = data.frame(
      visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
      n_train = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_train),
      n_test = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_test),
      n_features = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_features),
      n_medication_vars = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_medication_vars),
      mtry_candidates = sapply(results, function(x) paste(x$mtry_candidates, collapse = ", ")),
      mtry_used = sapply(results, function(x) x$mtry_used),
      rmse = sapply(results, function(x) x$rmse),
      mae = sapply(results, function(x) x$mae),
      r2 = sapply(results, function(x) x$r2),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ),
    feature_importance = feature_importance,
    mtry_values = mtry_values,
    mtry_candidates_used = mtry_candidates_used,
    strategy_used = mtry_strategy,
    bootstrap_results = bootstrap_all
  ))
}


# Función corregida con búsqueda de hiperparámetros completa
analisis_multivariable_rf_optimizado <- function(
    expression_data,
    clinical_data,
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
    medication_vars = c("on_levodopa", "on_dopamine_agonist", "on_other_pd_medications"),
    cohort_name = "training",
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 4,
    preprocess = TRUE,
    test_fraction = 0.3,
    n_bootstrap = 25,
    mtry_strategy = "adaptive",  # "adaptive", "low", "high", "tune", "grid"
    splitrule_candidates = c("variance", "extratrees", "maxstat")  # Split rules para regresión
) {

  required_packages <- c("dplyr", "broom", "ranger", "caret", "doParallel", "foreach", "tidyr")
  for (pkg in required_packages) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  }

  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)

  # Función para búsqueda de mejores hiperparámetros (mtry + splitrule)
  find_best_hyperparams <- function(X, y, mtry_candidates, splitrule_candidates, 
                                   n_trees = 100, test_fraction = 0.2) {
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test <- y[test_idx]

    hyperparam_results <- data.frame()

    # Probar todas las combinaciones de mtry y splitrule
    for (mtry_val in mtry_candidates) {
      for (splitrule_val in splitrule_candidates) {
        tryCatch({
          rf_model <- ranger(
            x = X_train,
            y = y_train,
            num.trees = n_trees,
            mtry = mtry_val,
            splitrule = splitrule_val,
            min.node.size = 1,
            sample.fraction = 0.8,
            importance = "none",
            verbose = FALSE
          )

          pred <- predict(rf_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions
          rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test - pred)^2))
          mae <- mean(abs(y_test - pred))
          r2 <- cor(y_test, pred)^2

          hyperparam_results <- rbind(hyperparam_results,
                                    data.frame(mtry = mtry_val, 
                                              splitrule = splitrule_val,
                                              rmse = rmse,
                                              mae = mae,
                                              r2 = r2))
        }, error = function(e) {
          message(paste("Error con mtry =", mtry_val, "splitrule =", splitrule_val, ":", e$message))
        })
      }
    }

    # Seleccionar la mejor combinación basada en RMSE
    if (nrow(hyperparam_results) > 0) {
      best_idx <- which.min(hyperparam_results$rmse)
      best_combo <- list(
        mtry = hyperparam_results$mtry[best_idx],
        splitrule = as.character(hyperparam_results$splitrule[best_idx])
      )
      return(list(best_combo = best_combo, all_results = hyperparam_results))
    } else {
      # Valores por defecto si falla toda la búsqueda
      return(list(best_combo = list(mtry = floor(sqrt(ncol(X))), splitrule = "variance"), 
              all_results = NULL))
    }
  }

  expression_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))

  # Preprocesar variables de medicación
  combined_data <- clinical_data %>%
    inner_join(expression_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(medication_vars),
                  ~ ifelse(. == "Yes", 1, 0)))

  available_med_vars <- medication_vars[medication_vars %in% colnames(combined_data)]
  medication_covariates <- if (length(available_med_vars) > 0) available_med_vars else NULL

  results <- list()
  models <- list()
  test_predictions <- list()
  feature_importance <- list()
  hyperparam_values <- list()
  hyperparam_candidates_used <- list()
  hyperparam_search_results <- list()

  for (v in visitas) {
    df_visit <- combined_data %>%
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id",
                            medication_covariates,
                            setdiff(colnames(expression_processed), "participant_id")))) %>%
      na.omit()

    if (nrow(df_visit) < 20) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }

    # Preparar datos
    expression_vars <- setdiff(colnames(df_visit),
                              c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", medication_covariates))
    X_expr <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(all_of(expression_vars)))
    y <- df_visit[[score_col]]

    if (preprocess) {
      nzv <- nearZeroVar(X_expr)
      if (length(nzv) > 0 && length(nzv) < ncol(X_expr)) {
        X_expr <- X_expr[, -nzv]
      }
      if (ncol(X_expr) > 2) {
        high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor(X_expr), cutoff = 0.95)
        if (length(high_corr) > 0 && length(high_corr) < ncol(X_expr)) {
          X_expr <- X_expr[, -high_corr]
        }
      }
    }

    # Combinar expresión con medicación
    if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) {
      X_med <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(all_of(medication_covariates)))
      X <- cbind(X_expr, X_med)
    } else {
      X <- X_expr
    }

    # Definir grid de hiperparámetros según estrategia
    n_features <- ncol(X)
    n_med_vars <- ifelse(!is.null(medication_covariates), length(medication_covariates), 0)
    
    # Definir candidatos de mtry según estrategia
    if (mtry_strategy == "low") {
      base_mtry <- max(1, floor(sqrt(n_features)))
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
        base_mtry * 0.3,
        base_mtry * 0.5,
        base_mtry,
        base_mtry * 1.5,
        base_mtry * 2,
        base_mtry * 3
      ))))
      
    } else if (mtry_strategy == "adaptive") {
      base_mtry <- floor(sqrt(n_features))
      if (n_med_vars > 0) {
        mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.5),
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.7),
          max(n_med_vars, base_mtry * 0.9),
          base_mtry,
          base_mtry * 1.2,
          base_mtry * 1.5
        ))))
      } else {
        mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
          base_mtry * 0.5,
          base_mtry * 0.7,
          base_mtry,
          base_mtry * 1.2,
          base_mtry * 1.5,
          base_mtry * 2
        ))))
      }
      
    } else if (mtry_strategy == "high") {
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
        floor(n_features * 0.1),
        floor(n_features * 0.2),
        floor(n_features * 0.3),
        floor(n_features * 0.4),
        floor(n_features * 0.5),
        floor(n_features * 0.6)
      ))))
      
    } else if (mtry_strategy == "tune" || mtry_strategy == "grid") {
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(seq(
        from = max(1, floor(n_features * 0.05)),
        to = min(n_features, floor(n_features * 0.8)),
        length.out = 10
      ))))
      
    } else {
      # Default: solo valores alrededor de sqrt
      base_mtry <- floor(sqrt(n_features))
      mtry_candidates <- unique(pmax(1, round(c(
        base_mtry * 0.5,
        base_mtry,
        base_mtry * 1.5,
        base_mtry * 2
      ))))
    }

    # Búsqueda de mejores hiperparámetros
    hyperparam_search <- find_best_hyperparams(
      X, y, 
      mtry_candidates = mtry_candidates,
      splitrule_candidates = splitrule_candidates,
      n_trees = 100, 
      test_fraction = 0.2
    )

    best_mtry <- hyperparam_search$best_combo$mtry
    best_splitrule <- hyperparam_search$best_combo$splitrule

    hyperparam_values[[v]] <- list(mtry = best_mtry, splitrule = best_splitrule)
    hyperparam_candidates_used[[v]] <- list(
      mtry_candidates = mtry_candidates,
      splitrule_candidates = splitrule_candidates
    )
    hyperparam_search_results[[v]] <- hyperparam_search$all_results

    message(paste("Visita", v, ": n_features =", n_features,
                 ", best_mtry =", best_mtry, 
                 ", best_splitrule =", best_splitrule,
                 ", medication_vars =", n_med_vars))

    # Split train/test para el modelo final
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- y[test_idx]

    # Random Forest con los mejores hiperparámetros encontrados
    final_model <- ranger(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      num.trees = n_trees,
      mtry = best_mtry,
      splitrule = best_splitrule,
      min.node.size = 5,
      sample.fraction = 0.8,
      importance = "permutation",  # Cambiado a permutation para mejor estimación
      verbose = FALSE,
      num.threads = n_cores,
      always.split.variables = if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) medication_covariates else NULL
    )

    # Predicciones y métricas
    test_pred <- predict(final_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions

    test_predictions[[v]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id[test_idx],
      sample_id = df_visit$sample_id[test_idx],
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = y_test,
      predicted_score = as.numeric(test_pred),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Bootstrap con los mejores hiperparámetros
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                                .packages = c("ranger", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
      set.seed(123 + i)
      train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
      test_idx  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)

      X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- y[train_idx]
      X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_test  <- y[test_idx]

      rf_fit <- ranger(
        x = X_train,
        y = y_train,
        num.trees = n_trees,
        mtry = best_mtry,
        splitrule = best_splitrule,
        min.node.size = 5,
        sample.fraction = 0.8,
        importance = "none",
        verbose = FALSE,
        always.split.variables = if (!is.null(medication_covariates)) medication_covariates else NULL
      )

      pred <- predict(rf_fit, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions

      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        rmse = sqrt(mean((y_test - pred)^2)),
        mae = mean(abs(y_test - pred)),
        r2 = cor(y_test, pred)^2,
        n_train = length(train_idx),
        n_test = length(test_idx)
      )
    }

    actual <- y_test
    predicted <- as.numeric(test_pred)

    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_train = length(train_idx),
      n_test = length(test_idx),
      n_features = n_features,
      n_medication_vars = n_med_vars,
      mtry_candidates = mtry_candidates,
      splitrule_candidates = splitrule_candidates,
      mtry_used = best_mtry,
      splitrule_used = best_splitrule,
      rmse = sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2)),
      mae = mean(abs(actual - predicted)),
      r2 = cor(actual, predicted)^2,
      bootstrap_results = bootstrap_results
    )

    # Importancia de variables
    if (!is.null(final_model$variable.importance)) {
      imp <- final_model$variable.importance
      imp_df <- data.frame(
        feature = names(imp),
        importance = imp,
        type = ifelse(names(imp) %in% medication_covariates, "medication", "expression"),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ) %>% arrange(desc(importance))
      feature_importance[[v]] <- imp_df
    }
  }

  bootstrap_all <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results, function(x) {
    if (!is.null(x$bootstrap_results)) {
      x$bootstrap_results$visit <- x$visit
      return(x$bootstrap_results)
    }
  }))

  return(list(
    models = models,
    test_predictions = bind_rows(test_predictions),
    summary = data.frame(
      visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
      n_train = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_train),
      n_test = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_test),
      n_features = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_features),
      n_medication_vars = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_medication_vars),
      mtry_candidates = sapply(results, function(x) paste(x$mtry_candidates, collapse = ", ")),
      splitrule_candidates = sapply(results, function(x) paste(x$splitrule_candidates, collapse = ", ")),
      mtry_used = sapply(results, function(x) x$mtry_used),
      splitrule_used = sapply(results, function(x) x$splitrule_used),
      rmse = sapply(results, function(x) x$rmse),
      mae = sapply(results, function(x) x$mae),
      r2 = sapply(results, function(x) x$r2),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ),
    feature_importance = feature_importance,
    hyperparam_values = hyperparam_values,
    hyperparam_candidates_used = hyperparam_candidates_used,
    hyperparam_search_results = hyperparam_search_results,
    strategy_used = mtry_strategy,
    splitrules_used = splitrule_candidates,
    bootstrap_results = bootstrap_all
  ))
}



# Función auxiliar para tuning de mtry
tune_mtry <- function(X, y, n_trees = 100, n_cores = 4) {
  mtry_values <- unique(round(seq(1, min(100, ncol(X)), length.out = 10)))
  results <- data.frame()
  
  for (mtry in mtry_values) {
    set.seed(123)
    model <- ranger(
      x = X, y = y,
      num.trees = n_trees,
      mtry = mtry,
      importance = "none",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
    
    r2 <- cor(y, model$predictions)^2
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(mtry = mtry, r2 = r2))
  }
  
  return(results$mtry[which.max(results$r2)])
}

    expression_data = PPMI_exp_p %>% select(any_of(pathways_selected_genes)),
    clinical_data = Covariates_medication,

    visitas = c("M12", "M24"),
    medication_vars = c("upd23b_clinical_state_on_medication", "upd23a_medication_for_pd"),     # "on_levodopa", "on_dopamine_agonist", "on_other_pd_medications", "use_of_pd_medication"
    cohort_name = paste("PPMI - low"),
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 8,
    # mtry_strategy = "low",

# Ejecutar el modelo sin variables de medicación

    expression_data = PPMI_exp_p %>% select(any_of(pathways_selected_genes)),
    clinical_data = Covariates_medication,
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
    visitas = c("M12", "M24"),
    medication_vars = NULL,  # Sin variables de medicación
    cohort_name = paste("PPMI - original"),
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 8,
    # mtry_strategy = "low",
    test_fraction = 0.2
)


# Combinar todos los resultados bootstrap
bootstrap_comparison <- bind_rows(
  resultados_original$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "Original (Genes only)"),
  resultados_state$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "Clinical State on Medication (upd23b)"),
  resultados_comb$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "Clinical State on Medication (upd23b) + Medication for PD (updb23a)"),
  resultados_levodopa$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "On Levodopa"),
  resultados_DA_agonist$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "On Dopamine Agonist"),
  resultados_other_med$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(model = "On Other PD Medications")
)

# Boxplot comparativo de los tres modelos
tt <- ggplot(bootstrap_comparison, 
       aes(x = visit, y = r2, fill = model)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(0.8), alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of medication and On/Off covariates on R² distributions",
    y = "R²",
    x = "Visit",
    fill = "Model"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c",
                             "#d62728", "#9467bd", "#8c564b")) +  # Colores distintos
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


tt

    filename = file.path("boxplot_comp_medication_vars.png"),
    plot = tt,
    width = 15,
    height = 8,
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )
```

###### **Corrección del score por medicación

```{r}



# ==== Función para corregir scores por cualquier covariable (ahora acepta vector o NULL) ====
corregir_scores_por_covariable <- function(clinical_data, 
                                          score_col = "Motor_Score_raw", 
                                          covariable = NULL) {
  # Si covariable es NULL -> no corregir, devolver datos con score_corregido = original
  if (is.null(covariable)) {
    datos <- clinical_data %>%
      mutate(
        score_original = .data[[score_col]],
        score_corregido = .data[[score_col]],
        covariable_correccion = NA_character_
      )
    attr(datos, "covariable_correccion") <- NULL
    attr(datos, "score_original") <- score_col
    message("No se aplicó corrección (covariable = NULL).")
    return(datos)
  }
  
  # Asegurar que covariable sea vector de caracteres
  covs <- as.character(covariable)
  
  # Verificar que las covariables existen
  faltantes <- setdiff(covs, colnames(clinical_data))
  if (length(faltantes) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Las siguientes covariables no existen en los datos:", paste(faltantes, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  datos_corregidos <- clinical_data
  
  # Para cada covariable: tratamiento de NA y conversión a numérica 0/1 en caso de factor/caracter
  for (cov in covs) {
    if (is.character(datos_corregidos[[cov]]) || is.factor(datos_corregidos[[cov]])) {
      # convertir NAs a "No" y luego a 1/0 (Yes -> 1, resto -> 0)
      datos_corregidos[[cov]] <- ifelse(is.na(datos_corregidos[[cov]]), "No", as.character(datos_corregidos[[cov]]))
      datos_corregidos[[cov]] <- ifelse(datos_corregidos[[cov]] == "Yes", 1, 0)
      datos_corregidos[[cov]] <- as.numeric(datos_corregidos[[cov]])
    } else {
      # numérica: imputar NA a 0 (asumimos covariables binarias numéricas)
      datos_corregidos[[cov]][is.na(datos_corregidos[[cov]])] <- 0
      datos_corregidos[[cov]] <- as.numeric(datos_corregidos[[cov]])
    }
  }
  
  # Modelo lineal con todas las covariables
  formula_str <- paste(score_col, "~", paste(covs, collapse = " + "))
  modelo_correccion <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = datos_corregidos)
  
  # Calcular residuos y reconstruir score_corregido (resid + media original)
  datos_corregidos <- datos_corregidos %>%
    mutate(
      score_original = .data[[score_col]],
      score_corregido = residuals(modelo_correccion) + mean(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Resumen del efecto de las covariables (por cada covariables, mostramos medias agrupadas por su valor)
  resumen_covariable <- purrr::map_dfr(covs, function(cov) {
    datos_corregidos %>%
      group_by(.data[[cov]]) %>%
      summarise(
        n = n(),
        mean_score_original = mean(score_original, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_score_corregido = mean(score_corregido, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(covariable = cov)
  })
  
  # Print del resumen simple y del summary del modelo
  message("Resumen de la corrección (por covariable):")
  # Si el resumen creado quedó vacío (por estructura), mostramos un resumen simple
  if (nrow(resumen_covariable) == 0) {
    print(summary(modelo_correccion))
  } else {
    print(resumen_covariable)
    print(summary(modelo_correccion))
  }
  
  # Atributos para tracking
  attr(datos_corregidos, "covariable_correccion") <- covs
  attr(datos_corregidos, "score_original") <- score_col
  
  return(datos_corregidos)
}


# ==== Función RF (modificada para múltiples covariables / NULL) ====
analisis_rf_scores_corregidos <- function(
    expression_data, 
    clinical_data_corregido,
    score_col = "score_corregido",
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
    cohort_name = "training",
    n_trees = 500,
    n_cores = 4,
    preprocess = TRUE,
    test_fraction = 0.3,
    n_bootstrap = 100,
    incluir_covariable = TRUE
) {
  required_packages <- c("dplyr", "broom", "ranger", "caret", "doParallel", "foreach", "tidyr", "purrr")
  for (pkg in required_packages) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  expression_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
  
  combined_data <- clinical_data_corregido %>%
    inner_join(expression_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas)
  
  # Verificar columnas necesarias
  required_cols <- c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", "visit_name")
  if (!all(required_cols %in% colnames(combined_data))) {
    missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(combined_data))
    stop(paste("Columnas faltantes:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  # Obtener la(s) covariable(s) usadas para la corrección (puede ser NULL o vector)
  covariable_used <- attr(clinical_data_corregido, "covariable_correccion")
  has_covariable <- !is.null(covariable_used) && length(covariable_used) > 0 && all(covariable_used %in% colnames(combined_data))
  
  results <- list()
  test_predictions <- list()
  feature_importance <- list()
  
  for (v in visitas) {
    # Definir columnas base a seleccionar
    base_cols <- c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", "visit_name")
    if (has_covariable && incluir_covariable) {
      base_cols <- unique(c(base_cols, covariable_used))
    }
    
    df_visit <- combined_data %>% 
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(base_cols, setdiff(colnames(expression_processed), c("participant_id", "sample_id"))))) %>%
      na.omit()
    
    if (nrow(df_visit) < 20) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    message(paste("Visita", v, ":", nrow(df_visit), "muestras con scores corregidos"))
    if (has_covariable) {
      message(paste("Covariable(s) de corrección:", paste(covariable_used, collapse = ", ")))
    }
    
    # Preparar matriz de features excluyendo score, ids y covariables (si se ha pedido)
    exclude_cols <- c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", "visit_name")
    if (has_covariable && incluir_covariable) {
      exclude_cols <- unique(c(exclude_cols, covariable_used))
    }
    
    X <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(exclude_cols)))
    y <- df_visit[[score_col]]
    
    if (preprocess) {
      nzv <- nearZeroVar(X)
      if (length(nzv) > 0 && length(nzv) < ncol(X)) {
        message(paste("Removidas", length(nzv), "variables de varianza casi cero"))
        X <- X[, -nzv, drop = FALSE]
      }
      
      if (ncol(X) > 2) {
        high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor(X), cutoff = 0.95)
        if (length(high_corr) > 0 && length(high_corr) < ncol(X)) {
          message(paste("Removidas", length(high_corr), "variables altamente correlacionadas"))
          X <- X[, -high_corr, drop = FALSE]
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (ncol(X) == 0) {
      message(paste("No hay variables después del preprocesamiento para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    # Split train/test
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)
    
    if (length(test_idx) == 0) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para test en la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- y[test_idx]
    
    # Random Forest (ranger)
    final_model <- ranger(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      num.trees = n_trees,
      mtry = max(1, floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train)))),
      min.node.size = 5,
      sample.fraction = 0.7,
      importance = "permutation",
      verbose = FALSE,
      num.threads = n_cores
    )
    
    # Predicciones
    test_pred <- predict(final_model, data = as.data.frame(X_test))$predictions
    
    # Dataframe de predicciones
    prediction_df <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id[test_idx],
      sample_id = df_visit$sample_id[test_idx],
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = y_test,
      predicted_score = as.numeric(test_pred),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Añadir columnas de covariables si existen y se pidió incluirlas
    if (has_covariable && incluir_covariable) {
      for (cov in covariable_used) {
        prediction_df[[paste0("covariable_", cov)]] <- df_visit[[cov]][test_idx]
      }
    }
    
    test_predictions[[v]] <- prediction_df
    
    # Métricas
    actual <- y_test
    predicted <- as.numeric(test_pred)
    rmse_final <- sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2))
    mae_final <- mean(abs(actual - predicted))
    r2_final <- ifelse(length(actual) > 1, cor(actual, predicted)^2, NA)
    
    # Importancia
    if (!is.null(final_model$variable.importance)) {
      imp <- final_model$variable.importance
      imp_df <- data.frame(
        feature = names(imp),
        importance = imp,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ) %>% arrange(desc(importance))
      feature_importance[[v]] <- imp_df
    }
    
    # Bootstrap validation (opcional)
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind, 
                                .packages = c("ranger", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
      set.seed(123 + i)
      train_idx_b <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
      test_idx_b  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx_b)
      
      if (length(test_idx_b) < 2) {
        return(data.frame(
          bootstrap = i,
          rmse = NA,
          mae = NA,
          r2 = NA,
          n_train = length(train_idx_b),
          n_test = length(test_idx_b)
        ))
      }
      
      X_train_b <- X[train_idx_b, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train_b <- y[train_idx_b]
      X_test_b  <- X[test_idx_b, , drop = FALSE]
      y_test_b  <- y[test_idx_b]
      
      rf_fit <- ranger(
        x = X_train_b,
        y = y_train_b,
        num.trees = n_trees,
        mtry = max(1, floor(sqrt(ncol(X_train_b)))),
        min.node.size = 5,
        sample.fraction = 0.7,
        importance = "none",
        verbose = FALSE
      )
      
      pred <- predict(rf_fit, data = as.data.frame(X_test_b))$predictions
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        rmse = sqrt(mean((y_test_b - pred)^2)),
        mae = mean(abs(y_test_b - pred)),
        r2 = ifelse(length(y_test_b) > 1, cor(y_test_b, pred)^2, NA),
        n_train = length(train_idx_b),
        n_test = length(test_idx_b)
      )
    }
    
    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_train = length(train_idx),
      n_test = length(test_idx),
      n_features = ncol(X),
      rmse = rmse_final,
      mae = mae_final,
      r2 = r2_final,
      bootstrap_results = bootstrap_results
    )
    
    message(paste("Visita", v, "completada - R² =", round(r2_final, 3)))
  }
  
  if (length(test_predictions) == 0) {
    stop("No se pudo completar ningún análisis para las visitas especificadas")
  }
  
  all_test_predictions <- bind_rows(test_predictions)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
    n_train = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_train),
    n_test = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_test),
    n_features = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_features),
    rmse = sapply(results, function(x) x$rmse),
    mae = sapply(results, function(x) x$mae),
    r2 = sapply(results, function(x) x$r2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  correction_info <- list(
    covariable_used = covariable_used,
    score_original = attr(clinical_data_corregido, "score_original")
  )
  
  return(list(
    test_predictions = all_test_predictions,
    summary = summary_df,
    detailed_results = results,
    feature_importance = feature_importance,
    clinical_data_corregido = clinical_data_corregido,
    correction_info = correction_info
  ))
}


# ==== comparar_correcciones (acepta lista/vector de covariables y añade siempre el modelo sin corrección) ====
comparar_correcciones <- function(clinical_data, expression_data, covariables, visitas = c("M12", "M24")) {
  # covariables puede ser:
  # - lista/vectores: list("cov1", c("cov1","cov2"), NULL, ...)
  # - o vector simple donde un elemento puede ser "cov1" y otro elemento ser "cov1,cov2" -> mejor pasar lista.
  
  # Asegurarnos de trabajar con una lista
  if (!is.list(covariables)) {
    covariables_list <- lapply(seq_along(covariables), function(i) {
      el <- covariables[[i]]
      if (is.null(el)) return(NULL)
      if (is.character(el) && length(el) == 1 && grepl(",", el)) {
        return(trimws(unlist(strsplit(el, ","))))
      }
      return(el)
    })
  } else {
    covariables_list <- covariables
  }
  
  # Añadir explícitamente el modelo sin corrección al inicio
  covariables_list <- c(list(NULL), covariables_list)
  
  resultados_comparacion <- list()
  all_bootstrap_results <- list()
  
  for (cov_item in covariables_list) {
    # Nombre legible para el modelo
    modelo_label <- if (is.null(cov_item)) {
      "Sin corrección"
    } else if (is.character(cov_item) && length(cov_item) > 1) {
      paste("Corrected for", paste(cov_item, collapse = "+"))
    } else {
      paste("Corrected for", cov_item)
    }
    
    message(paste("Procesando:", modelo_label))
    
    # Aplicar corrección (si cov_item es NULL, se devuelven scores sin corregir)
    datos_corregidos <- corregir_scores_por_covariable(
      clinical_data = clinical_data,
      score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
      covariable = cov_item
    )
    
    # Ejecutar RF
    resultados <- analisis_rf_scores_corregidos(
      expression_data = expression_data,
      clinical_data_corregido = datos_corregidos,
      score_col = "score_corregido",
      visitas = visitas,
      cohort_name = modelo_label,
      n_trees = 500,
      n_cores = 8,
      test_fraction = 0.2
    )
    
    resultados_comparacion[[modelo_label]] <- resultados
    
    # Extraer y organizar resultados bootstrap
    for (v in visitas) {
      if (!is.null(resultados$detailed_results[[v]])) {
        bootstrap_df <- resultados$detailed_results[[v]]$bootstrap_results %>%
          mutate(
            covariable = modelo_label,
            visit = v,
            modelo = modelo_label
          )
        all_bootstrap_results[[paste(modelo_label, v)]] <- bootstrap_df
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Combinar todos los resultados bootstrap (si hay)
  if (length(all_bootstrap_results) > 0) {
    bootstrap_completo <- bind_rows(all_bootstrap_results)
  } else {
    bootstrap_completo <- tibble()
    message("No se generaron resultados bootstrap para las combinaciones solicitadas.")
  }
  
  # Si hay bootstrap, crear gráficos; si no, avisar
  if (nrow(bootstrap_completo) > 0) {
    p_boxplot <- ggplot(bootstrap_completo, aes(x = visit, y = r2, fill = covariable)) +
      geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(0.8), alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2), size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(
        title = "Effect of score correction for medication on R² distributions",
        subtitle = paste("Number of bootstrap iterations:", length(unique(bootstrap_completo$bootstrap))),
        y = "R² (Bootstrap)", 
        x = "Visit",
        fill = "Covariate"
      ) +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
    
    p_rmse <- ggplot(bootstrap_completo, aes(x = visit, y = rmse, fill = covariable)) +
      geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(0.8), alpha = 0.7) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = "Comparación de RMSE Bootstrap", y = "RMSE (Bootstrap)", x = "Visita", fill = "Covariable") +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")
    
    print(p_boxplot)
  } else {
    p_boxplot <- NULL
    p_rmse <- NULL
  }
  
  # Resumen estadístico (si hay datos)
  if (nrow(bootstrap_completo) > 0) {
    resumen_bootstrap <- bootstrap_completo %>%
      group_by(covariable, visit) %>%
      summarise(
        r2_mean = mean(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_sd = sd(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_q25 = quantile(r2, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_q75 = quantile(r2, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
        rmse_mean = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
        rmse_sd = sd(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_bootstrap = n(),
        .groups = 'drop'
      )
  } else {
    resumen_bootstrap <- tibble()
  }
  
  # Tabla comparativa de resultados finales
  comparacion_final <- map_dfr(resultados_comparacion, function(res) {
    res$summary %>% mutate(covariable = paste(res$correction_info$covariable_used %||% "Without Correction", collapse = ","))
  }, .id = "model")
  
  print("RESULTADOS MODELOS FINALES:")
  print(comparacion_final)
  
  return(list(
    resultados_comparacion = resultados_comparacion,
    bootstrap_completo = bootstrap_completo,
    resumen_bootstrap = resumen_bootstrap,
    plot_r2 = p_boxplot,
    plot_rmse = p_rmse
  ))
}



covariables_a_probar <- c(
  "upd23b_clinical_state_on_medication", 
  "use_of_pd_medication",
  "on_dopamine_agonist",
  "on_levodopa",
  "on_other_pd_medications"
)

resultados_comparativos <- comparar_correcciones(
  clinical_data = Covariates_medication,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_p,
  covariables = covariables_a_probar,
  visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
)


dd <- resultados_comparativos$plot_r2


ggsave(
    filename = file.path("boxplot_comp_medication_score_correction.png"),
    plot = dd,
    width = 15,
    height = 8,
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )



```


```{r}

# Función para combinar y visualizar resultados
comparar_resultados_completos <- function(resultados_original, resultados_corregidos, nombre_corregido = "Corregido") {
  
  # Extraer resultados bootstrap del modelo original
  boot_original <- lapply(resultados_original$detailed_results, function(x) {
    if (!is.null(x$bootstrap_results)) {
      x$bootstrap_results %>% 
        mutate(
          visit = x$visit,
          modelo = "Original",
          tipo = x$visit
        )
    }
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  # Extraer resultados bootstrap de los modelos corregidos
  boot_corregidos_list <- list()
  
  for (nombre_modelo in names(resultados_corregidos)) {
    resultados <- resultados_corregidos[[nombre_modelo]]
    covariable <- resultados$correction_info$covariable_used
    
    boot_corregido <- lapply(resultados$detailed_results, function(x) {
      if (!is.null(x$bootstrap_results)) {
        x$bootstrap_results %>% 
          mutate(
            visit = x$visit,
            modelo = nombre_modelo,
            covariable = covariable,
            # Crear etiqueta especial para M12 corregido
            tipo = ifelse(visit == "M12", 
                         paste("M12 -", nombre_modelo), 
                         visit)
          )
      }
    }) %>% bind_rows()
    
    boot_corregidos_list[[nombre_modelo]] <- boot_corregido
  }
  
  boot_corregidos <- bind_rows(boot_corregidos_list)
  
  # Combinar todos los resultados
  boot_combinado <- bind_rows(
    boot_original,
    boot_corregidos
  )
  
  # Crear factor ordenado para mejor visualización
  niveles_visit <- unique(boot_combinado$visit)
  niveles_ordenados <- c()
  for (v in niveles_visit) {
    if (v == "M12") {
      # Para M12, poner primero el original y luego los corregidos
      niveles_ordenados <- c(niveles_ordenados, "M12")
      modelos_m12 <- unique(boot_combinado$modelo[boot_combinado$visit == "M12" & boot_combinado$modelo != "Original"])
      for (mod in modelos_m12) {
        niveles_ordenados <- c(niveles_ordenados, paste("M12 -", mod))
      }
    } else {
      niveles_ordenados <- c(niveles_ordenados, v)
    }
  }
  
  boot_combinado <- boot_combinado %>%
    mutate(
      tipo_factor = factor(tipo, levels = niveles_ordenados),
      es_corregido = modelo != "Original",
      es_m12_corregido = visit == "M12" & modelo != "Original"
    )
  
  return(boot_combinado)
}
```
