```{r}
resultados_corregidos_lista <- list(
  "on_levodopa" = resultados_rf_corregidos_levodopa,
  "on_dopamine_agonist" = resultados_rf_corregidos_agonista,
  "use_of_pd_medication" = resultados_rf_corregidos_uso,
  "upd23b_clinical_state_on_medication" = resultados_rf_corregidos_state
)

# Paso 3: Verificar que tenemos el modelo original
# Si no lo tienes, ejecuta:
resultados_rf <- analisis_multivariable_rf(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_p,
  clinical_data = Covariates_score,
  score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
  visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
  cohort_name = "PPMI - Sporadic",
  n_trees = 500,
  test_fraction = 0.2,
  n_cores = 8
)

# Paso 4: Combinar y visualizar resultados
boot_combinado <- comparar_resultados_completos(
  resultados_original = resultados_rf,
  resultados_corregidos = resultados_corregidos_lista
)

# Función modificada para el plot completo
visualizar_comparacion_unificada <- function(boot_combinado) {
  
  # Crear una variable unificada de visita-modelo
  boot_combinado <- boot_combinado %>%
    mutate(
      # Para visitas corregidas, usar el nombre del modelo como "visita"
      visita_plot = ifelse(modelo == "Original", 
                          visit, 
                          paste0(visit, "_", modelo)),
      # Factor ordenado: primero todas las originales, luego las corregidas
      tipo_plot = ifelse(modelo == "Original", "Original", "Corrected")
    )
  
  # Ordenar los niveles para mejor visualización
  visitas_originales <- c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
  visitas_corregidas <- boot_combinado %>% 
    filter(modelo != "Original") %>%
    distinct(visita_plot) %>%
    pull(visita_plot) %>%
    sort()
  
  niveles_ordenados <- c(visitas_originales, visitas_corregidas)
  
  boot_combinado$visita_plot <- factor(boot_combinado$visita_plot, 
                                      levels = niveles_ordenados)
  
  # Paleta de colores
  colores <- c("Original" = "steelblue", 
               "on_levodopa" = "red", 
               "on_dopamine_agonist" = "darkgreen",
               "use_of_pd_medication" = "purple")
  
  # Gráfico unificado
  p <- ggplot(boot_combinado, aes(x = visita_plot, y = r2, fill = modelo)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = "R² distribution per model",
      y = "R² (Bootstrap)",
      x = "Model"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colores, name = "Model") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "bottom") +
    # Líneas separadoras entre grupos
    geom_vline(xintercept = length(visitas_originales) + 0.5, 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    annotate("text", x = length(visitas_originales)/2, y = max(boot_combinado$r2, na.rm = TRUE),
             label = "Originals", vjust = -1, fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = length(visitas_originales) + length(visitas_corregidas)/2, 
             y = max(boot_combinado$r2, na.rm = TRUE),
             label = "Corrected", vjust = -1, fontface = "bold")
  
  return(p)
}

# Aplicar las visualizaciones
print("Gráfico unificado:")
p_unificado <- visualizar_comparacion_unificada(boot_combinado)
print(p_unificado)


ggsave(
    filename = file.path("boxplot_comparative_medication.png"),
    plot = p_unificado,
    width = 10,
    height = 8,
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )

```







###### Predecir en otras cohortes RF
```{r}

# Función para predecir en nuevas cohortes
predecir_otras_cohortes <- function(resultados_rf, 
                                   expression_data_nuevo, 
                                   clinical_data_nuevo, 
                                   mutation_groups = NULL,
                                   visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")) {
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión nuevos
  expression_nuevo_processed <- expression_data_nuevo %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
  
  # Combinar con datos clínicos nuevos
  combined_nuevo <- clinical_data_nuevo %>%
    inner_join(expression_nuevo_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas)
  
  # Si se especifican grupos de mutación, filtrar
  if (!is.null(mutation_groups)) {
    combined_nuevo <- combined_nuevo %>%
      filter(mutation %in% mutation_groups)
  }
  
  # Lista para almacenar predicciones
  all_predictions <- list()
  
  # Iterar por cada visita del modelo
  for (v in names(resultados_rf$models)) {
    
    # Obtener modelo para esta visita
    modelo_visita <- resultados_rf$models[[v]]
    
    if (is.null(modelo_visita)) next
    
    # Filtrar datos nuevos para esta visita
    df_visita_nuevo <- combined_nuevo %>%
      filter(visit_name == v) 
    # %>%
    #   na.omit()
    # 
    if (nrow(df_visita_nuevo) == 0) next
    
    # Obtener características del modelo original
    features_modelo <- names(modelo_visita$variable.importance)
    
    # Preparar datos para predicción
    X_nuevo <- df_visita_nuevo %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(features_modelo)) %>%
      as.data.frame()
    
    # Verificar que tenemos todas las features necesarias
    missing_features <- setdiff(features_modelo, colnames(X_nuevo))
    
    if (length(missing_features) > 0) {
      warning(paste("Faltan features para la visita", v, ":", paste(missing_features, collapse = ", ")))
      # Añadir columnas faltantes con valores 0
      for (feat in missing_features) {
        median_val <- median(modelo_visita$data[[feat]], na.rm = TRUE)
        X_nuevo <- cbind(X_nuevo, matrix(median_val, nrow = nrow(X_nuevo), ncol = 1,
                                         dimnames = list(NULL, feat)))
      }
      # Reordenar columnas para que coincidan con el modelo
      X_nuevo <- X_nuevo[, features_modelo, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    # Realizar predicciones
    tryCatch({
      predicciones <- predict(modelo_visita, data = as.data.frame(X_nuevo))$predictions
      
      # Almacenar resultados
      predictions_df <- data.frame(
        sample_id = df_visita_nuevo$sample_id,
        participant_id = df_visita_nuevo$participant_id,
        visit = v,
        mutation = df_visita_nuevo$mutation,
        actual_score = ifelse(!is.null(df_visita_nuevo[[resultados_rf$target]]),
                             df_visita_nuevo[[resultados_rf$target]], NA),
        predicted_score = as.numeric(predicciones),
        cohort = df_visita_nuevo$mutation,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      all_predictions[[v]] <- predictions_df
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(paste("Error en predicción para visita", v, ":", e$message))
    })
  }
  
  # Combinar todas las predicciones
  if (length(all_predictions) > 0) {
    final_predictions <- bind_rows(all_predictions)
    return(final_predictions)
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}



# O predecir para grupos específicos
grupos_mutacion <- unique(Covariates_p$mutation)
predicciones_por_grupo <- list()

for (grupo in grupos_mutacion) {
  predicciones_por_grupo[[grupo]] <- predecir_otras_cohortes(
    resultados_rf = resultados_rf,
    expression_data_nuevo = PPMI_exp_p,
    clinical_data_nuevo = Covariates_p,
    mutation_groups = grupo,
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
  )
}

# Combinar todas las predicciones
predicciones_finales <- bind_rows(predicciones_por_grupo, .id = "mutation_group")





# Combinar predicciones de training con predicciones de nuevas cohortes
# Primero preparamos las predicciones del training
training_predictions <- resultados_rf$test_predictions %>%
  mutate(
    mutation_group = resultados_rf$cohort_name,
    dataset = "Training",
    cohort_type = "Training"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_id, participant_id, visit, mutation_group, 
                predicted_score, dataset, cohort_type)

# Preparar predicciones de nuevas cohortes
new_predictions <- predicciones_finales %>%
  mutate(
    dataset = "Validation",
    cohort_type = mutation_group
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_id, participant_id, visit, mutation_group, 
                predicted_score, dataset, cohort_type)

# Combinar ambos datasets
combined_predictions <- bind_rows(training_predictions, new_predictions)


library(ggplot2)


# Crear una lista de plots, uno por visita
plots_por_visita <- combined_predictions %>%
  split(.$visit) %>%
  lapply(function(df_visita) {
    ggplot(df_visita, aes(x = mutation_group, y = predicted_score, fill = dataset)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Predicted Motor Score -", unique(df_visita$visit)),
        x = "Mutation group",
        y = "Predicted Score"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
  })

plots_por_visita


combined_predictions <- combined_predictions %>%
  mutate(visit_mutation = paste0(visit, "_", mutation_group))

ggplot(combined_predictions, aes(x = visit_mutation, y = predicted_score, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Motor Score by Visit and Mutation Group",
    x = "Visit + Mutation group",
    y = "Predicted Score"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )




```


##### Motor & Non Motor Lasso

```{r}

analisis_multivariable_lasso <- function(
    expression_data, 
    clinical_data,
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw", 
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
    alpha = 0.05,
    cohort_name = "training",
    n_cores = 4,
    preprocess = TRUE,
    max_features = 500,
    test_fraction = 0.3,
    n_bootstrap = 10
) {
  
  required_packages <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "glmnet", "caret", "doParallel", "foreach")
  for (pkg in required_packages) {
    if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
      install.packages(pkg)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  expression_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
  
  combined_data <- clinical_data %>%
    inner_join(expression_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas)
  
  results <- list()
  models <- list()
  model_data <- list()
  test_predictions <- list()
  feature_importance <- list()
  
  for (v in visitas) {
    df_visit <- combined_data %>% 
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id", setdiff(colnames(expression_processed), "participant_id")))) %>%
      na.omit()
    
    if (nrow(df_visit) < 20) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    X <- as.matrix(df_visit %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", "sample_id"))))
    y <- df_visit[[score_col]]
    
    if (preprocess) {
      # Eliminar predictores de varianza casi cero
      nzv <- nearZeroVar(X)
      if (length(nzv) > 0 && length(nzv) < ncol(X)) {
        X <- X[, -nzv]
      }
      # Eliminar predictores altamente correlacionados
      if (ncol(X) > 2) {
        high_corr <- findCorrelation(cor(X), cutoff = 0.95)
        if (length(high_corr) > 0 && length(high_corr) < ncol(X)) {
          X <- X[, -high_corr]
        }
      }
    }
    
    # ---- Split train/test ----
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
    test_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)
    
    X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- y[train_idx]
    X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- y[test_idx]
    
    feature_names <- colnames(X_train)
    
    # ---- Lasso con validación cruzada ----
    cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(
      x = X_train, y = y_train, 
      alpha = 1,              # Lasso
      nfolds = 5,
      parallel = TRUE,
      standardize = TRUE
    )
    
    final_model <- glmnet(
      x = X_train, y = y_train,
      alpha = 1,
      lambda = cv_lasso$lambda.min,
      standardize = TRUE
    )
    
    # Predicciones sobre test
    test_pred <- predict(final_model, newx = X_test, s = cv_lasso$lambda.min)
    
    test_predictions[[v]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id[test_idx],
      sample_id = df_visit$sample_id[test_idx],
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = y_test,
      predicted_score = as.numeric(test_pred),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    rmse_final <- sqrt(mean((y_test - test_pred)^2))
    mae_final <- mean(abs(y_test - test_pred))
    r2_final <- cor(y_test, test_pred)^2
    
    # Importancia de features: coeficientes Lasso
    coefs <- coef(final_model, s = cv_lasso$lambda.min)
    imp_df <- data.frame(
      feature = rownames(coefs)[-1],
      importance = as.numeric(coefs[-1]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) %>% arrange(desc(abs(importance)))
    feature_importance[[v]] <- imp_df
    
    # ---- Bootstrap ----
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind, .packages = c("glmnet")) %dopar% {
      set.seed(123 + i)
      train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(X)), size = floor((1 - test_fraction) * nrow(X)))
      test_idx  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), train_idx)
      
      X_train <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_train <- y[train_idx]
      X_test  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      y_test  <- y[test_idx]
      
      cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = X_train, y = y_train, alpha = 1, nfolds = 5, parallel = FALSE, standardize = TRUE)
      pred <- predict(cv_fit, newx = X_test, s = cv_fit$lambda.min)
      
      rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test - pred)^2))
      mae <- mean(abs(y_test - pred))
      r2 <- cor(y_test, pred)^2
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        rmse = rmse,
        mae = mae,
        r2 = r2,
        n_train = length(train_idx),
        n_test = length(test_idx)
      )
    }
    
    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_train = length(train_idx),
      n_test = length(test_idx),
      n_features = ncol(X),
      rmse = rmse_final,
      mae = mae_final,
      r2 = r2_final,
      bootstrap_results = bootstrap_results
    )
    
    models[[v]] <- final_model
    model_data[[v]] <- list(
      X_train = X_train, y_train = y_train,
      X_test = X_test, y_test = y_test,
      participant_ids = df_visit$participant_id,
      feature_names = feature_names
    )
  }
  
  all_test_predictions <- bind_rows(test_predictions)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
    n_train = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_train),
    n_test = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_test),
    n_features = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_features),
    rmse = sapply(results, function(x) x$rmse),
    mae = sapply(results, function(x) x$mae),
    r2 = sapply(results, function(x) x$r2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  return(list(
    models = models,
    model_data = model_data,
    test_predictions = all_test_predictions,
    summary = summary_df,
    detailed_results = results,
    feature_importance = feature_importance,
    target = score_col,
    cohort_name = cohort_name
  ))
}


# Entrenar el modelo Lasso con la cohorte principal
resultados_lasso <- analisis_multivariable_lasso(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_p,        # Tus datos de expresión
  clinical_data  = Covariates_score, # Tus datos clínicos (con participant_id como "PP-XXXX")
  score_col      = "Motor_Score_raw",
  visitas        = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
  cohort_name    = "PPMI - Sporadic",
  test_fraction  = 0.2,
  n_cores        = 8,
  n_bootstrap    = 10   # opcional, puedes reducir a 1 si quieres solo predicción directa
)




# ---- Scatter Predicted vs Actual ----
ggplot(resultados_lasso$test_predictions,
       aes(x = actual_score, y = predicted_score, color = visit)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted vs Actual Motor Score (Test Set)",
    x = "Actual score",
    y = "Predicted score"
  )

boot_all <- lapply(resultados_lasso$detailed_results, function(x) {
  if (!is.null(x$bootstrap_results) && nrow(x$bootstrap_results) > 0) {
    x$bootstrap_results %>% mutate(visit = x$visit)
  }
}) %>% bind_rows()

# Usar s1 como R²
ggplot(boot_all, aes(x = visit, y = s1, fill = visit)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrap R² distribution per visit (Motor) (Lasso)",
    y = "R²",
    x = "Visit"
  )






### Non Motor

# Entrenar el modelo Lasso con la cohorte principal
```

###### Predecir en otras cohortes LASSO

```{r}

predecir_otras_cohortes_lasso <- function(resultados_lasso, 
                                         expression_data_nuevo, 
                                         clinical_data_nuevo, 
                                         mutation_groups = NULL,
                                         visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")) {
  
  library(dplyr)
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión nuevos
  expression_nuevo_processed <- expression_data_nuevo %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
  
  # Combinar con datos clínicos nuevos
  combined_nuevo <- clinical_data_nuevo %>%
    inner_join(expression_nuevo_processed, by = "sample_id") %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% visitas)
  
  # Filtrar por grupos de mutación si aplica
  if (!is.null(mutation_groups)) {
    combined_nuevo <- combined_nuevo %>%
      filter(mutation %in% mutation_groups)
  }
  
  all_predictions <- list()
  
  for (v in names(resultados_lasso$models)) {
    modelo_visita <- resultados_lasso$models[[v]]
    if (is.null(modelo_visita)) next
    
    df_visita_nuevo <- combined_nuevo %>%
      filter(visit_name == v)
    if (nrow(df_visita_nuevo) == 0) next
    
    features_modelo <- resultados_lasso$model_data[[v]]$feature_names
    
    # Preparar datos para predicción
    X_nuevo <- df_visita_nuevo %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(features_modelo)) %>%
      as.matrix()
    
    # Añadir columnas faltantes con la mediana de la cohorte original
    missing_features <- setdiff(features_modelo, colnames(X_nuevo))
    if (length(missing_features) > 0) {
      for (feat in missing_features) {
        median_val <- median(resultados_lasso$model_data[[v]]$X_train[, feat], na.rm = TRUE)
        X_nuevo <- cbind(X_nuevo, matrix(median_val, nrow = nrow(X_nuevo), ncol = 1,
                                         dimnames = list(NULL, feat)))
      }
      # Reordenar columnas
      X_nuevo <- X_nuevo[, features_modelo, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    # Predicción usando Lasso
    predicciones <- predict(modelo_visita, newx = X_nuevo, s = resultados_lasso$model_data[[v]]$lambda_min)
    
    predictions_df <- data.frame(
      sample_id = df_visita_nuevo$sample_id,
      participant_id = df_visita_nuevo$participant_id,
      visit = v,
      mutation = ifelse("mutation" %in% colnames(df_visita_nuevo), df_visita_nuevo$mutation, NA),
      actual_score = ifelse(!is.null(df_visita_nuevo[[resultados_lasso$target]]),
                             df_visita_nuevo[[resultados_lasso$target]], NA),
      predicted_score = as.numeric(predicciones),
      cohort = ifelse("mutation" %in% colnames(df_visita_nuevo), df_visita_nuevo$mutation, NA),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_predictions[[v]] <- predictions_df
  }
  
  if (length(all_predictions) > 0) {
    final_predictions <- bind_rows(all_predictions)
    return(final_predictions)
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}


# Grupos de mutación
grupos_mutacion <- unique(Covariates_p$mutation)
predicciones_por_grupo <- list()

for (grupo in grupos_mutacion) {
  predicciones_por_grupo[[grupo]] <- predecir_otras_cohortes_lasso(
    resultados_lasso = resultados_lasso,
    expression_data_nuevo = PPMI_exp_p,
    clinical_data_nuevo = Covariates_p,
    mutation_groups = grupo,
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
  )
}

# Combinar todas las predicciones
predicciones_finales <- bind_rows(predicciones_por_grupo, .id = "mutation_group")


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Preparar datos combinados
original_all <- resultados_lasso$test_predictions %>%
  mutate(cohort = resultados_lasso$cohort_name) %>%
  select(participant_id, predicted_score, cohort, visit)

nuevas_all <- predicciones_finales %>%
  select(participant_id, predicted_score, cohort = mutation_group, visit)

boxplot_data <- bind_rows(original_all, nuevas_all)

# Crear lista para guardar plots
plots_por_visita <- list()

# Iterar sobre cada visita
for (v in unique(boxplot_data$visit)) {
  df_visita <- boxplot_data %>% filter(visit == v)
  
  p <- ggplot(df_visita, aes(x = cohort, y = predicted_score, fill = cohort)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Predicted Motor Scores at", v),
      y = "Predicted Motor Score",
      x = "Cohort"
    ) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")
  
  plots_por_visita[[v]] <- p
}

# Mostrar un ejemplo (por ejemplo M0)
plots_por_visita

# Opcional: guardar cada plot como archivo PNG
# for (v in names(plots_por_visita)) {
#   ggsave(paste0("Predicted_scores_", v, ".png"), plot = plots_por_visita[[v]], width = 8, height = 6)
# }


#### Non Motor



# Grupos de mutación
grupos_mutacion <- unique(Covariates_p$mutation)
predicciones_por_grupo <- list()

for (grupo in grupos_mutacion) {
  predicciones_por_grupo[[grupo]] <- predecir_otras_cohortes_lasso(
    resultados_lasso = resultados_lasso_NM,
    expression_data_nuevo = PPMI_exp_p,
    clinical_data_nuevo = Covariates_p,
    mutation_groups = grupo,
    visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
  )
}

# Combinar todas las predicciones
predicciones_finales <- bind_rows(predicciones_por_grupo, .id = "mutation_group")


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Preparar datos combinados
original_all <- resultados_lasso_NM$test_predictions %>%
  mutate(cohort = resultados_lasso_NM$cohort_name) %>%
  select(participant_id, predicted_score, cohort, visit)

nuevas_all <- predicciones_finales %>%
  select(participant_id, predicted_score, cohort = mutation_group, visit)

boxplot_data <- bind_rows(original_all, nuevas_all)

# Crear lista para guardar plots
plots_por_visita <- list()

# Iterar sobre cada visita
for (v in unique(boxplot_data$visit)) {
  df_visita <- boxplot_data %>% filter(visit == v)
  
  p <- ggplot(df_visita, aes(x = cohort, y = predicted_score, fill = cohort)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Predicted Non-Motor Scores at", v),
      y = "Predicted Non-Motor Score",
      x = "Cohort"
    ) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")
  
  plots_por_visita[[v]] <- p
}

# Mostrar un ejemplo (por ejemplo M0)
plots_por_visita

# Opcional: guardar cada plot como archivo PNG
# for (v in names(plots_por_visita)) {
#   ggsave(paste0("Predicted_scores_", v, ".png"), plot = plots_por_visita[[v]], width = 8, height = 6)
# }



```














# *Predicting severity score using transcriptomics

```{r}

# Lista de dataframes con los valores de expresión de cada pathway y los valores de la variable clínica señal.
pathways_M0 <- Subsets_pathways[unique(Sev_score_detail_M0$Pathway)] # 3791 genes
pathways_M12 <- Subsets_pathways[unique(Sev_score_detail_M12$Pathway)] # 1779 genes
pathways_M24 <- Subsets_pathways[unique(Sev_score_detail_M24$Pathway)] # 3002 genes
pathways_M36 <- Subsets_pathways[unique(Sev_score_detail_M36$Pathway)] # 5914 genes

pathways_all <- c(pathways_M0, pathways_M12, pathways_M24, pathways_M36)


# Función para generar los plots individuales
generate_r2_plot <- function(results_df, title) {
  # Crear factor ordenado para las combinaciones
  results_df$combination <- factor(
    paste(results_df$train_visit, "→", results_df$predict_visit, "(", results_df$score_type, ")"),
    levels = unique(paste(results_df$train_visit, "→", results_df$predict_visit, "(", results_df$score_type, ")"))
  )

  ggplot(results_df, aes(x = combination, y = Rsquared_original)) +
    # Puntos y barras de error
    geom_point(size = 3, color = "#2c7fb8") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Rsquared_lower_ci, ymax = Rsquared_upper_ci), 
                  width = 0.2, color = "#2c7fb8", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    
    # Etiquetas y formato
    labs(title = title,
         x = "Combinación Train → Predict (Type)",
         y = "R² (con IC 95%)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(-1, 1),
      breaks = seq(-1, 1, by = 0.1)
    )
}

```

## SGR prediction

### Lasso

#### Predict severity score variation (SGR) between visits (train visit genes only)

```{r eval=FALSE}

predict_motor_SGR <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                              train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                              test_size = 0.2, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVO BLOQUE: función para entrenar y evaluar ===
  train_and_evaluate <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, best_lambda = NULL) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    x_train <- as.matrix(train_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_train <- train_data[[target_var]]
    x_test <- as.matrix(test_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
    
    grid <- 10^seq(3, -3, length = 1000)
    lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, lambda = grid)
    best_lambda <- lasso_model$lambda.min
    
    predictions <- predict(lasso_model, newx = x_test, s = best_lambda)
    mse <- mean((y_test - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(y_test)
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(y_test)
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    registerDoParallel(cores = 10)
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, lambda, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "glmnet") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), nrow(x_train), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- glmnet(x_train[idx, ], y_train[idx], alpha = 1, lambda = lambda)
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, newx = x_test)
        var_y <- var(y_test)
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((y_test - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, best_lambda, n_bootstrap)
    
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      best_lambda = best_lambda,
      n_predictors = ncol(x_train)
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- get(paste0("pathways_M", train_visit))
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod", 
                          "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                 target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}

results_lasso_SGR <- predict_motor_SGR(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  n_bootstrap = 10
)

saveRDS(results_lasso_SGR, "results_lasso_SGR_nofilter_group_factor_vsg")



```

```{r}
plot_SGR <- generate_r2_plot(results_lasso_SGR, "Lasso para predicción SGR y SGR+1")

plot_SGR
```

#### Predict severity score variation (SGR) between visits (All Genes)


```{r eval=FALSE}


predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                              train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                              test_size = 0.2, pathways_to_use = pathways_all, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVO BLOQUE: función para entrenar y evaluar ===
  train_and_evaluate <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, best_lambda = NULL) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    x_train <- as.matrix(train_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_train <- train_data[[target_var]]
    x_test <- as.matrix(test_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
    
    grid <- 10^seq(5, -3, length = 1000)
    lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, lambda = grid)
    best_lambda <- lasso_model$lambda.min
    
    predictions <- predict(lasso_model, newx = x_test, s = best_lambda)
    mse <- mean((y_test - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(y_test)
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(y_test)
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    registerDoParallel(cores = 10)
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, lambda, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "glmnet") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), nrow(x_train), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- glmnet(x_train[idx, ], y_train[idx], alpha = 1, lambda = lambda)
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, newx = x_test)
        var_y <- var(y_test)
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((y_test - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, best_lambda, n_bootstrap)
    
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      best_lambda = best_lambda,
      n_predictors = ncol(x_train)
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- pathways_to_use
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod", 
                          "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                 target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}

results_lasso_SGR_all_pathways <- predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  pathways_to_use = pathways_all,
  n_bootstrap = 100
)

saveRDS(results_lasso_SGR_all_pathways, "results_lasso_SGR_nofilter_group_factor_allpathways_vsg")
```

### Random Forest 

#### Predict severity score variation (SGR) between visits (train visit genes only)

```{r eval=FALSE}

predict_motor_SGR_rf <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                                            train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                                            test_size = 0.2, 
                                            n_bootstrap = 100, tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, 
                                            mtry = NULL, nodesize = 5,
                                            tune_control = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVA FUNCIÓN PARA ENTRENAR Y EVALUAR CON RANDOM FOREST ===
  train_and_evaluate_rf <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, 
                                   tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, mtry = NULL, 
                                   nodesize = 5, tune_control = tune_control) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    # Convertir a data.frame (necesario para caret)
    train_df <- as.data.frame(train_data)
    test_df <- as.data.frame(test_data)
    
    # Configurar fórmula
    formula_rf <- as.formula(paste(target_var, "~ ."))
    
    # Optimización de hiperparámetros con caret
    if (tune) {
      # Definir grid de búsqueda
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        base_mtry <- floor(ncol(train_df) / 3)
        mtry_grid <- round(seq(max(1, base_mtry - 100), base_mtry + 100, length.out = 10))
      } else {
        mtry_grid <- mtry
      }
      
      tune_grid <- expand.grid(
        mtry = mtry_grid,
        splitrule = "variance",
        min.node.size = c(5, 10, 15)
      )
      
      # Entrenar con validación cruzada
      rf_caret <- train(
        form = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        method = "ranger",
        trControl = tune_control,
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        num.trees = ntree,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
      # Obtener mejores parámetros
      best_mtry <- rf_caret$bestTune$mtry
      best_nodesize <- rf_caret$bestTune$min.node.size
      
      # Entrenar modelo final con todos los datos de entrenamiento
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = best_mtry,
        min.node.size = best_nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
    } else {
      # Usar parámetros fijos sin tuning
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        mtry <- floor(sqrt(ncol(train_df) - 1))
      }
      
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = mtry,
        min.node.size = nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
    }
    
    # Predecir y evaluar
    predictions <- predict(rf_model, data = test_df)$predictions
    mse <- mean((test_df[[target_var]] - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(test_df[[target_var]])
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    # Función bootstrap para IC de R²
    registerDoParallel(cores = min(10, detectCores()-1))
    
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(data, formula, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "ranger") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(data), nrow(data), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- ranger(
          formula = formula,
          data = data[idx, ],
          num.trees = ntree,
          mtry = mtry,
          min.node.size = nodesize
        )
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, data = test_df)$predictions
        var_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((test_df[[target_var]] - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    # Calcular estadísticos bootstrap
    if (tune) {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, best_mtry, best_nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    } else {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    }
    
    # Retornar resultados
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      mtry_used = ifelse(tune, best_mtry, mtry),
      nodesize_used = ifelse(tune, best_nodesize, nodesize),
      n_predictors = ncol(train_df) - 1
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- get(paste0("pathways_M", train_visit))
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod", 
                         "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size, 
                                       tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size, 
                                     tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                  target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}



results_rf_SGR <- predict_motor_SGR_rf(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  n_bootstrap = 100
)

saveRDS(results_rf_SGR, "results_RF_SGR_nofilter_group_factor_vsg")
```

#### Predict severity score variation (SGR) between visits (All Genes)

```{r eval=FALSE}

predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways_rf <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                                            train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                                            test_size = 0.2, pathways_to_use = pathways_all, 
                                            n_bootstrap = 100, tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, 
                                            mtry = NULL, nodesize = 5,
                                            tune_control = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVA FUNCIÓN PARA ENTRENAR Y EVALUAR CON RANDOM FOREST ===
  train_and_evaluate_rf <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, 
                                   tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, mtry = NULL, 
                                   nodesize = 5, tune_control = tune_control) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    # Convertir a data.frame (necesario para caret)
    train_df <- as.data.frame(train_data)
    test_df <- as.data.frame(test_data)
    
    # Configurar fórmula
    formula_rf <- as.formula(paste(target_var, "~ ."))
    
    # Optimización de hiperparámetros con caret
    if (tune) {
      # Definir grid de búsqueda
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        base_mtry <- floor(ncol(train_df) / 3)
        mtry_grid <- round(seq(max(1, base_mtry - 100), base_mtry + 100, length.out = 10))
      } else {
        mtry_grid <- mtry
      }
      
      tune_grid <- expand.grid(
        mtry = mtry_grid,
        splitrule = "variance",
        min.node.size = c(5, 10, 15)
      )
      
      # Entrenar con validación cruzada
      rf_caret <- train(
        form = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        method = "ranger",
        trControl = tune_control,
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        num.trees = ntree,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
      # Obtener mejores parámetros
      best_mtry <- rf_caret$bestTune$mtry
      best_nodesize <- rf_caret$bestTune$min.node.size
      
      # Entrenar modelo final con todos los datos de entrenamiento
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = best_mtry,
        min.node.size = best_nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
    } else {
      # Usar parámetros fijos sin tuning
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        mtry <- floor(sqrt(ncol(train_df) - 1))
      }
      
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = mtry,
        min.node.size = nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
    }
    
    # Predecir y evaluar
    predictions <- predict(rf_model, data = test_df)$predictions
    mse <- mean((test_df[[target_var]] - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(test_df[[target_var]])
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    # Función bootstrap para IC de R²
    registerDoParallel(cores = min(10, detectCores()-1))
    
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(data, formula, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "ranger") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(data), nrow(data), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- ranger(
          formula = formula,
          data = data[idx, ],
          num.trees = ntree,
          mtry = mtry,
          min.node.size = nodesize
        )
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, data = test_df)$predictions
        var_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((test_df[[target_var]] - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    # Calcular estadísticos bootstrap
    if (tune) {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, best_mtry, best_nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    } else {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    }
    
    # Retornar resultados
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      mtry_used = ifelse(tune, best_mtry, mtry),
      nodesize_used = ifelse(tune, best_nodesize, nodesize),
      n_predictors = ncol(train_df) - 1
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- pathways_to_use
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod", 
                         "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size, 
                                       tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size, 
                                     tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                  target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}



results_rf_SGR_all_pathways <- predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways_rf(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  pathways_to_use = pathways_all,
  n_bootstrap = 100
)

saveRDS(results_rf_SGR_all_pathways, "results_RF_SGR_nofilter_group_factor_allpathways_vsg")
```

#### Predict severity score variation (SGR) between visits (All Genes) -> SGR+1, SGR+2, SGR+3...

```{r eval=FALSE}



predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways_rf <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                                            train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                                            test_size = 0.2, pathways_to_use = pathways_all, 
                                            n_bootstrap = 100, tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, 
                                            mtry = NULL, nodesize = 5,
                                            tune_control = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # === NUEVA FUNCIÓN PARA ENTRENAR Y EVALUAR CON RANDOM FOREST ===
  train_and_evaluate_rf <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, 
                                   tune = TRUE, ntree = 500, mtry = NULL, 
                                   nodesize = 5, tune_control = tune_control) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    # Convertir a data.frame (necesario para caret)
    train_df <- as.data.frame(train_data)
    test_df <- as.data.frame(test_data)
    
    # Configurar fórmula
    formula_rf <- as.formula(paste(target_var, "~ ."))
    
    # Optimización de hiperparámetros con caret
    if (tune) {
      # Definir grid de búsqueda
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        base_mtry <- floor(ncol(train_df) / 3)
        mtry_grid <- round(seq(max(1, base_mtry - 100), base_mtry + 100, length.out = 10))
      } else {
        mtry_grid <- mtry
      }
      
      tune_grid <- expand.grid(
        mtry = mtry_grid,
        splitrule = "variance",
        min.node.size = c(5, 10, 15)
      )
      
      # Entrenar con validación cruzada
      rf_caret <- train(
        form = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        method = "ranger",
        trControl = tune_control,
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        num.trees = ntree,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
      # Obtener mejores parámetros
      best_mtry <- rf_caret$bestTune$mtry
      best_nodesize <- rf_caret$bestTune$min.node.size
      
      # Entrenar modelo final con todos los datos de entrenamiento
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = best_mtry,
        min.node.size = best_nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      
    } else {
      # Usar parámetros fijos sin tuning
      if (is.null(mtry)) {
        mtry <- floor(sqrt(ncol(train_df) - 1))
      }
      
      rf_model <- ranger(
        formula = formula_rf,
        data = train_df,
        num.trees = ntree,
        mtry = mtry,
        min.node.size = nodesize,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
    }
    
    # Predecir y evaluar
    predictions <- predict(rf_model, data = test_df)$predictions
    mse <- mean((test_df[[target_var]] - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(test_df[[target_var]])
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    # Función bootstrap para IC de R²
    registerDoParallel(cores = min(10, detectCores()-1))
    
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(data, formula, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "ranger") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(data), nrow(data), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- ranger(
          formula = formula,
          data = data[idx, ],
          num.trees = ntree,
          mtry = mtry,
          min.node.size = nodesize
        )
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, data = test_df)$predictions
        var_y <- var(test_df[[target_var]])
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((test_df[[target_var]] - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    # Calcular estadísticos bootstrap
    if (tune) {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, best_mtry, best_nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    } else {
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(train_df, formula_rf, ntree, mtry, nodesize, n_bootstrap)
    }
    
    # Retornar resultados
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      mtry_used = ifelse(tune, best_mtry, mtry),
      nodesize_used = ifelse(tune, best_nodesize, nodesize),
      n_predictors = ncol(train_df) - 1
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- pathways_to_use
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod", 
                         "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw", "Motor_Score_mod")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size, 
                                         tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    } else {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate_rf(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size, 
                                       tune, ntree, mtry, nodesize, tune_control)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}




results_rf_SGR_all_pathways <- predict_motor_SGR_all_pathways_rf(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  pathways_to_use = pathways_all,
  n_bootstrap = 100
)

saveRDS(results_rf_SGR_all_pathways, "results_RF_SGR_nofilter_group_factor_allpathways_allvisits_vsg")
```

## Cumulative increase in severity score 

### Lasso

#### Predict cumulative increase in severity score between visits (train visit genes only)

```{r eval=FALSE}

predict_motor_increase <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                              train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                              test_size = 0.2, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVO BLOQUE: función para entrenar y evaluar ===
  train_and_evaluate <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, best_lambda = NULL) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    x_train <- as.matrix(train_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_train <- train_data[[target_var]]
    x_test <- as.matrix(test_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
    
    grid <- 10^seq(3, -3, length = 1000)
    lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, lambda = grid)
    best_lambda <- lasso_model$lambda.min
    
    predictions <- predict(lasso_model, newx = x_test, s = best_lambda)
    mse <- mean((y_test - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(y_test)
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(y_test)
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    registerDoParallel(cores = 10)
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, lambda, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "glmnet") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), nrow(x_train), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- glmnet(x_train[idx, ], y_train[idx], alpha = 1, lambda = lambda)
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, newx = x_test)
        var_y <- var(y_test)
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((y_test - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, best_lambda, n_bootstrap)
    
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      best_lambda = best_lambda,
      n_predictors = ncol(x_train)
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- get(paste0("pathways_M", train_visit))
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      #mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw_Cumulative", "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative", 
                          "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw_Cumulative", "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                 target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}

results_lasso_cumulative <- predict_motor_increase(
  expression_data = PPMI_exp,
  severity_scores = combined_severity_score_all_visits_acc,
  train_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36), 
  predict_visits = c(0, 12, 24, 36),
  n_bootstrap = 100
)


saveRDS(results_lasso_cumulative, "results_lasso_cumulative_nofilter_group_factor_vsg")
```

#### Predict cumulative increase in severity score between visits (all pathways)


```{r eval=FALSE}



predict_motor_increase_all_pathways <- function(expression_data, severity_scores, 
                              train_visits = 0, predict_visits = NULL, 
                              test_size = 0.2, pathways_to_use = pathways_all, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit == train_visit | predict_visit == train_visit + 12)
  
  # === NUEVO BLOQUE: función para entrenar y evaluar ===
  train_and_evaluate <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size, best_lambda = NULL) {
    
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    x_train <- as.matrix(train_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_train <- train_data[[target_var]]
    x_test <- as.matrix(test_data %>% dplyr::select(starts_with("ENSG")))
    y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
    
    grid <- 10^seq(3, -3, length = 1000)
    lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, lambda = grid)
    best_lambda <- lasso_model$lambda.min
    
    predictions <- predict(lasso_model, newx = x_test, s = best_lambda)
    mse <- mean((y_test - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(y_test)
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(y_test)
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    registerDoParallel(cores = 10)
    bootstrap_r2 <- function(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, lambda, n_bootstrap = 1000) {
      r2_values <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'c', .packages = "glmnet") %dopar% {
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), nrow(x_train), replace = TRUE)
        model_boot <- glmnet(x_train[idx, ], y_train[idx], alpha = 1, lambda = lambda)
        pred_test <- predict(model_boot, newx = x_test)
        var_y <- var(y_test)
        ifelse(var_y > .Machine$double.eps, 1 - (mean((y_test - pred_test)^2) / var_y), NA)
      }
      list(
        r2_mean = mean(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_median = median(r2_values, na.rm = TRUE),
        r2_ci = quantile(r2_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    
    bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_r2(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, best_lambda, n_bootstrap)
    
    list(
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared_original = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$r2_mean,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_median = bootstrap_results$r2_median,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$r2_ci[2],
      best_lambda = best_lambda,
      n_predictors = ncol(x_train)
    )
  }
  
  # === FUNCIÓN MODIFICADA ===
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    
    # Elegir pathways_list según train_visit
    pathways_list <- pathways_to_use
    pathways_select_unique <- pathways_list[!duplicated(names(pathways_list))]
    gene_names <- unique(unlist(pathways_select_unique))
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data %>%
      dplyr::select(any_of(gene_names)) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id") %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_id %in% severity_scores$sample_id) #%>%
      # mutate_at(vars(-sample_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
    
    correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-sample_id))
    correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
    highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
    correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
    remaining_genes <- setdiff(gene_names, correlated_genes)
    
    PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
      dplyr::select(sample_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
    
    genes_predict_severity <- merge(
      severity_scores[, c("Motor_Score_raw_Cumulative", "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative", 
                          "sample_id", "participant_id", "Visit")], 
      PPMI_exp_selected, 
      by = "sample_id"
    )
    
    score_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw_Cumulative", "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative")
    
    df_filtered <- genes_predict_severity %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit)
    
    df_model <- df_filtered %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      summarize(
        Motor_Score_train = .data[[score_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        Motor_Score_predict = .data[[score_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        across(starts_with("ENSG"), ~ .[Visit == train_visit])
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Motor_Score_sum = Motor_Score_train + Motor_Score_predict)
    
    results <- list()
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit) {
      res_train <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_train", test_size)
      results[[1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                 target = "Motor_Score_train", res_train, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (predict_visit == train_visit + 12) {
      res_sum <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "Motor_Score_sum", test_size)
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type,
                                                   target = "Motor_Score_train+predict", res_sum, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
    
    do.call(rbind, results)
  }

  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}

)
```
