## Clinical relevance 

```{r eval=FALSE}


# Variables clínicas de interés
vars_numericas <- c("mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score", "mds_updrs_part_i_sub_score", "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score", "mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score", "mds_updrs_part_iv_summary_score", "Abeta", "upsit_total_score", "rbd_summary_score", "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score")
vars_categoricas <- c("sex", "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage", "code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment", "code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis", "prognosis_status", "dementia_status", "MOCA_Status")

# Unión de datasets por sample_id
df_combined <- left_join(Covariates_clusterMotor, Covariates, by = "sample_id")

# Asegurar que cluster_motor es factor
df_combined$cluster_motor <- as.factor(df_combined$cluster_motor)
df_combined$Visit <- as.factor(df_combined$Visit)  # o numérico si las visitas son 0, 12, 24, etc.


# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)  # For combining plots

# Ensure df_combined is properly prepared
df_combined$cluster_motor <- as.factor(df_combined$cluster_motor)
df_combined$Visit <- as.factor(df_combined$Visit)

# Function to create numeric variable plots
create_numeric_plot <- function(var_name) {
  df_combined %>%
    group_by(cluster_motor, Visit) %>%
    summarise(
      med_score = median(get(var_name), na.rm = TRUE),
      q1 = quantile(get(var_name), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      q3 = quantile(get(var_name), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Visit, y = med_score, color = cluster_motor, group = cluster_motor)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = q1, ymax = q3), width = 0.2) +
    labs(title = paste("Evolution of", var_name, "by cluster (median and IQR)"),
         x = "Visit (months)",
         y = paste("Median", var_name)) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Function to create categorical variable plots
create_categorical_plot <- function(var_name) {
  df_combined %>%
    group_by(cluster_motor, Visit, .data[[var_name]]) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop_last') %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Visit, y = prop, fill = .data[[var_name]])) +
    geom_col(position = "stack") +
    facet_wrap(~cluster_motor) +
    labs(title = paste("Proportion of", var_name, "by cluster over time"),
         x = "Visit (months)",
         y = "Proportion") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

# Create all numeric plots
numeric_plots <- map(vars_numericas, create_numeric_plot)
names(numeric_plots) <- vars_numericas

# Create all categorical plots
categorical_plots <- map(vars_categoricas, create_categorical_plot)
names(categorical_plots) <- vars_categoricas

# To view a specific plot (example):
numeric_plots$mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score
categorical_plots$sex

# To save all plots to files:
walk2(numeric_plots, names(numeric_plots), ~ggsave(paste0("plot_", .y, ".png"), .x, width = 8, height = 6))
walk2(categorical_plots, names(categorical_plots), ~ggsave(paste0("plot_", .y, ".png"), .x, width = 8, height = 6))

# To combine all numeric plots into one multi-page PDF:
pdf("all_numeric_plots.pdf")
walk(numeric_plots, print)
dev.off()

# To combine all categorical plots into one multi-page PDF:
pdf("all_categorical_plots.pdf")
walk(categorical_plots, print)
dev.off()




```



# Predicting Progression 

Una vez predecimos los percentiles, sería posible predecir la trayectoria de los pacientes en base a estos?
Si ya he hecho un clustering basado en la diferencia entre percentiles, cuál sería la mejor manera?



**Falta incluir el cálculo de la importancia de los predictores para cada una de las clases.

```{r eval=FALSE}

# Función para realizar clustering y predicción para múltiples valores de k
evaluate_clusters_for_ks <- function(severity_scores, expression_data, k_values = 2:5, test_size = 0.2, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>% 
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.), 
           participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)), 
           sample_id = NULL, .before = 1)
  
  # Lista para almacenar resultados
  all_results <- list()
  
  for (k in k_values) {
    cat("\nEvaluando para k =", k, "...\n")
    
    # --- Proceso de clustering ---
    df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
    df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
    
    # Transformar a formato wide
    df_wide <- pivot_wider(df_long_cluster, 
                          names_from = Visit, 
                          values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile, 
                          names_prefix = "Visit_")
    
    # Crear dataframe con deltas entre visitas
    df_diff <- df_wide %>%
      mutate(
        S0 = Visit_0,
        diff_0_12 = (Visit_12 - Visit_0),
        diff_12_24 = (Visit_24 - Visit_12),
        diff_24_36 = (Visit_36 - Visit_24)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
    
    # Preparar datos para clustering
    data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
    removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
    if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
      cat("Variables no consideradas (sin variación):", removed_vars, "\n")
    }
    
    data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
    data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
    
    # Aplicar k-means
    set.seed(123)
    km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
    
    # Visualización del clustering
    print(fviz_cluster(
      km_cluster_motor, 
      data = data_scaled, 
      main = paste("Clusters Motor Progression (k =", k, ")")
    ))
    
    # Asignar clusters al dataframe
    df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
    
    # --- Predicción de clusters basada en expresión ---
    predict_motor_cluster_from_expression <- function(expression_data, cluster_data, test_size, n_bootstrap) {
      
      # Preparar los datos de cluster
      cluster_df <- cluster_data %>%
        dplyr::select(participant_id, cluster)
      
      # Procesar datos de expresión (usando todas las variables)
      PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data #%>%
        # mutate_at(vars(-participant_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
      
      # Eliminar genes altamente correlacionados
      correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-participant_id))
      correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
      highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
      correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
      remaining_genes <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-participant_id)), correlated_genes)
      
      PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
        dplyr::select(participant_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
      
      # Combinar con datos de cluster
      df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
        inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id") %>%
        dplyr::select(-participant_id) %>%
        mutate(cluster = as.factor(cluster))
      
      # Función para entrenar y evaluar el modelo de clasificación
      train_and_evaluate_classification <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size) {
        
        set.seed(123)
        train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
        train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
        test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
        
        x_train <- train_data %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(target_var))
        y_train <- train_data[[target_var]]
        x_test <- test_data %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(target_var))
        y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
        
        # Entrenar modelo Random Forest
        rf_model <- randomForest(x = x_train, y = y_train, importance = TRUE)  # Asegúrate de activar importance=TRUE
        
        # Obtener importancia de variables (MeanDecreaseAccuracy o MeanDecreaseGini)
        var_importance <- importance(rf_model, type = 1)  # type=1 para MeanDecreaseAccuracy
        var_importance_df <- as.data.frame(var_importance) %>%
          tibble::rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
          arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy))

        predictions <- predict(rf_model, newdata = x_test)
        
        # Métricas de evaluación
        conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(predictions, y_test)
        overall_accuracy <- conf_matrix$overall["Accuracy"]
        kappa <- conf_matrix$overall["Kappa"]
        
        # Bootstrap para estimar intervalos de confianza
        registerDoParallel(cores = 12)
        bootstrap_metrics <- function(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, n_bootstrap = 100) {
          metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'rbind', .packages = c("randomForest", "caret")) %dopar% {
            tryCatch({
              idx <- sample(1:nrow(x_train), nrow(x_train), replace = TRUE)
              rf_boot <- randomForest(x = x_train[idx, ], y = y_train[idx])
              pred_test <- predict(rf_boot, newdata = x_test)
              cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_test, y_test)
              c(Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"], Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"])
            }, error = function(e) {
              c(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA)
            })
          }
          
          metrics <- as.data.frame(metrics)
          
          list(
            accuracy_mean = mean(metrics$Accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
            accuracy_ci = quantile(metrics$Accuracy, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
            kappa_mean = mean(metrics$Kappa, na.rm = TRUE),
            kappa_ci = quantile(metrics$Kappa, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
          )
        }    
        bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_metrics(x_train, y_train, x_test, y_test, n_bootstrap)
        
        list(
          ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
          Accuracy = overall_accuracy,
          Kappa = kappa,
          Accuracy_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$accuracy_mean,
          Accuracy_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$accuracy_ci[1],
          Accuracy_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$accuracy_ci[2],
          Kappa_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$kappa_mean,
          Kappa_lower_ci = bootstrap_results$kappa_ci[1],
          Kappa_upper_ci = bootstrap_results$kappa_ci[2],
          n_predictors = ncol(x_train),
          n_clusters = length(unique(y_train)),
          VariableImportance = var_importance_df  
        )
      }
      
      # Ejecutar el entrenamiento y evaluación
      results <- train_and_evaluate_classification(df_model, "cluster", test_size)
      
      return(results)
    }
    
    # Ejecutar predicción
    prediction_results <- predict_motor_cluster_from_expression(
      expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0_id,
      cluster_data = df_diff,
      test_size = test_size,
      n_bootstrap = n_bootstrap
    )
    
    # Almacenar resultados
    all_results[[paste0("k_", k)]] <- list(
      k = k,
      clustering = km_cluster_motor,
      cluster_data = df_diff,
      prediction_results = prediction_results
    )
  }
  
  return(all_results)
}

# Ejemplo de uso:
results <- evaluate_clusters_for_ks(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  k_values = 2:5,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 500
)



# Para k=2
top_predictors_k2 <- results$k_2$prediction_results$VariableImportance

# Para k=3
top_predictors_k3 <- results$k_3$prediction_results$VariableImportance


# Para k=4
top_predictors_k4 <- results$k_4$prediction_results$VariableImportance

# Para k=3
top_predictors_k5 <- results$k_5$prediction_results$VariableImportance




# saveRDS(results, "progression_prediction_RF_2to5k")

results$k_2$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix
results$k_3$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix
results$k_4$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix
results$k_5$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix
# results$k_6$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix






pdf("Matrices_de_Confusion_clustStab_vst.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)

for (k in 2:5) {
  # Extraer la matriz y estadísticos
  conf_matrix <- results[[paste0("k_", k)]]$prediction_results$ConfusionMatrix
  
  # Convertir la salida en texto (incluyendo estadísticos)
  texto_salida <- capture.output(print(conf_matrix))  # Si ya incluye estadísticos
  # Si no, usar: texto_salida <- capture.output(confusionMatrix(conf_matrix))
  
  # Crear un gráfico con el texto
  plot.new()
  title(main = paste("Results for k =", k))
  grid::grid.text(
    paste(texto_salida, collapse = "\n"),
    x = 0.5, y = 0.5, just = "center",
    gp = grid::gpar(fontfamily = "mono", fontsize = 10)  # Usar fuente monoespaciada
  )
}

dev.off()







# Seleccionar top 100 predictores
top_100_k2 <- top_predictors_k2 %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) %>%
  head(100)

# Gráfico de barras horizontales
ggplot(top_100_k2, aes(x = reorder(Variable, MeanDecreaseAccuracy), y = MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +  # Barras horizontales
  labs(
    title = "Top 100 Predictores (k = 2)",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Importancia (MeanDecreaseAccuracy)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 1)
  )

# Seleccionar top 100 predictores
top_100_k3 <- top_predictors_k3 %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) %>%
  head(100)

# Gráfico de barras horizontales
ggplot(top_100_k3, aes(x = reorder(Variable, MeanDecreaseAccuracy), y = MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +  # Barras horizontales
  labs(
    title = "Top 100 Predictores (k = 3)",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Importancia (MeanDecreaseAccuracy)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 1)
  )




```

## CV

  Este apartado se replica más adelante en una función que permite utilizar clínica conjuntamente.

```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_clusters_for_ks <- function(severity_scores, expression_data, k_values = 2:5, test_size = 0.2, n_bootstrap = 100) {
  
  # Cargar librerías adicionales necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>% 
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.), 
           participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)), 
           sample_id = NULL, .before = 1)
  
  # Lista para almacenar resultados
  all_results <- list()
  
  for (k in k_values) {
    cat("\nEvaluando para k =", k, "...\n")
    
    # --- Proceso de clustering (se mantiene igual) ---
    df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
    df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
    
    df_wide <- pivot_wider(df_long_cluster, 
                          names_from = Visit, 
                          values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile, 
                          names_prefix = "Visit_")
    
    df_diff <- df_wide %>%
      mutate(
        S0 = Visit_0,
        diff_0_12 = (Visit_12 - Visit_0),
        diff_12_24 = (Visit_24 - Visit_12),
        diff_24_36 = (Visit_36 - Visit_24)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
    
    data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
    removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
    if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
      cat("Variables no consideradas (sin variación):", removed_vars, "\n")
    }
    
    data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
    data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
    
    set.seed(123)
    km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
    df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
    
    # --- Nueva función para predicción con ajuste de hiperparámetros ---
    predict_motor_cluster_with_tuning <- function(expression_data, cluster_data, test_size, n_bootstrap) {
      
      # Preparar datos de cluster
      cluster_df <- cluster_data %>%
        dplyr::select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
        mutate(cluster = factor(cluster),
               cluster = make.names(cluster))  # Convertir a nombres válidos
      
      # Procesar datos de expresión
      PPMI_exp_selected <- expression_data #%>%
        # mutate_at(vars(-participant_id), ~ log2(. + 0.1))
      
      # Eliminar genes altamente correlacionados
      correlation_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-participant_id))
      correlation_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(correlation_matrix))
      highly_correlated <- correlation_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
      correlated_genes <- unique(c(highly_correlated$Var1, highly_correlated$Var2))
      remaining_genes <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_selected %>% dplyr::select(-participant_id)), correlated_genes)
      
      PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_selected %>% 
        dplyr::select(participant_id, any_of(remaining_genes))
      
      # Combinar con datos de cluster
      df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
        inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id") %>%
        dplyr::select(-participant_id) %>%
        mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))  # Asegurar que es factor
      
      # Dividir en train y test
      set.seed(123)
      train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
      train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
      test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
      
      # Configurar validación cruzada
      ctrl <- trainControl(
        method = "repeatedcv",
        number = 5,          # 5-fold CV
        repeats = 3,         # 3 repeticiones
        classProbs = TRUE,
        summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
        allowParallel = TRUE
      )
      
      # Definir grilla de hiperparámetros para Random Forest
      tune_grid <- expand.grid(
        mtry = seq(2, sqrt(ncol(train_data)-1), length.out = 5) %>% floor()  # Rango para mtry
      )
      
      # Entrenar modelo con ajuste de hiperparámetros
      set.seed(123)
      rf_tuned <- train(
        x = train_data %>% dplyr::select(-cluster),
        y = train_data$cluster,
        method = "rf",
        metric = "Accuracy",
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        trControl = ctrl,
        ntree = 100,        # Número de árboles fijo
        importance = TRUE
      )
      
      # Evaluar en conjunto de prueba
      test_pred <- predict(rf_tuned, newdata = test_data)
      conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
      
      # Bootstrap para intervalos de confianza (opcional)
      bootstrap_metrics <- function(model, train_data, test_data, n_bootstrap = 100) {
        registerDoParallel(cores = detectCores() - 1)
        
        # Modificación clave: asegurar que siempre devolvemos un data.frame estructurado
        metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'rbind', .packages = c("randomForest", "caret")) %dopar% {
          tryCatch({
            idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
            rf_boot <- randomForest(
              x = train_data[idx, -which(names(train_data) == "cluster")],
              y = train_data[idx, "cluster"],
              mtry = model$bestTune$mtry,
              ntree = 100
            )
            pred_test <- predict(rf_boot, newdata = test_data)
            cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_test, test_data$cluster)
        
            # Balanced Accuracy
            bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
              mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
            } else {
              cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
            }
        
            data.frame(
              Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
              Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
              BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
          }, error = function(e) {
            data.frame(
              Accuracy = NA,
              Kappa = NA,
              BalancedAccuracy = NA
            )
          })
        }

        
        # Verificar que tenemos métricas válidas
        if (ncol(metrics) < 2 || all(is.na(metrics$Accuracy))) {
          stop("No se pudieron calcular métricas en el bootstrap")
        }
        
        # Calcular estadísticas omitiendo NAs
        list(
          accuracy_mean = mean(metrics$Accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
          accuracy_ci = quantile(metrics$Accuracy, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
          kappa_mean = mean(metrics$Kappa, na.rm = TRUE),
          kappa_ci = quantile(metrics$Kappa, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
          balanced_accuracy_mean = mean(metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
          balanced_accuracy_ci = quantile(metrics$BalancedAccuracy, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
          bootstrap_results = metrics
        )

      }
      
      bootstrap_results <- bootstrap_metrics(rf_tuned, train_data, test_data, n_bootstrap)
      
      # Retornar resultados
      list(
        TunedModel = rf_tuned,
        BestHyperparameters = rf_tuned$bestTune,
        ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
        Accuracy = conf_matrix$overall["Accuracy"],
        Kappa = conf_matrix$overall["Kappa"],
        Accuracy_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$accuracy_mean,
        Accuracy_ci = bootstrap_results$accuracy_ci,
        Kappa_bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_results$kappa_mean,
        Kappa_ci = bootstrap_results$kappa_ci,
        VariableImportance = varImp(rf_tuned)$importance,
        BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_results$bootstrap_results
      )
    }
    
    # Ejecutar predicción con ajuste de hiperparámetros
    prediction_results <- predict_motor_cluster_with_tuning(
      expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0_id,
      cluster_data = df_diff,
      test_size = test_size,
      n_bootstrap = n_bootstrap
    )
    
    # Almacenar resultados
    all_results[[paste0("k_", k)]] <- list(
      k = k,
      clustering = km_cluster_motor,
      cluster_data = df_diff,
      prediction_results = prediction_results
    )
  }
  
  return(all_results)
}




# Ejemplo de uso:
results <- evaluate_clusters_for_ks(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  k_values = 2,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 50
)


saveRDS(results, "progression_prediction_RF_2k")
```

# Confounders progression

Ver cómo afecta a la predicción la inclusión de variables confounder: variables que causen el input(expresión de genes) y el output (predicción).

Las predicciones que se van a analizar son:
- Cambio de percentil
- Grupos de progresión


Las posibles variables confounder que se analizarán serán:
- 


## MOTOR

```{r}


n_boots <- 25

k <- 2


evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 5,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(60, 30,10),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 10,
  ntrees_select = 500
  
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  # Preparar covariables clínicas
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  
  # Clustering
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  
  # Preparar datos modelado
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # Quitar genes altamente correlacionados
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(., var = "sample_id")
  
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(
        covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id),
        by = "sample_id"
      )
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))

    
  # Transformar covariable si es factor o carácter binario
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      # Obtener niveles excluyendo NA
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", clinical_covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }

  
  # Split train/test
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  # Validación cruzada
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = 3,
    repeats = 1,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
    allowParallel = TRUE
  )
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    # mtry = seq(2, sqrt(ncol(train_data)-1), length.out = 3) %>% floor(),
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )
  
  # Entrenamiento
  set.seed(123)
  rf_model <- train(
    x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
    y = train_data$cluster,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
    )
  
  # Predicciones
  test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
  conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
  
  if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(conf_matrix$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }
  
  # Bootstrap
  bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                               .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      rf_boot <- ranger(
        formula = cluster ~ .,
        data = train_data[idx, ],
        mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation",
        always.split.variables = clinical_covar
      )
      pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
      cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
      
      bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
        mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
      }
      
      data.frame(
        Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
        Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
        BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
    })
  }
  
  # Resultado
  list(
    Model = rf_model,
    ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
    BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance

  )
}




```


Si queremos seleccionar mediante bootstrap y luego entrenar el modelo definitivo:
```{r}

evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 10,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(60, 30, 10),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 10,
  ntrees_select = 500
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  require(tibble)   # <--- necesario para enframe() y rownames_to_column()
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # ---- 1. Preparar datos ----
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  # ---- 2. Clustering sobre el score ----
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # ---- 3. Filtrado de genes altamente correlacionados ----
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id")
  
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id), by = "sample_id")
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))
  
  # Transformar covariable si es binaria
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", clinical_covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }

  # ---- 4. Split train/test ----
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data  <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )

  # ---- 5. Bootstrap interno para tuning ----
  cat("Iniciando bootstrap interno para selección de hiperparámetros...\n")
  bootstrap_tuning <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                              .packages = c("ranger", "caret", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      train_boot <- train_data[idx, ]
      oob_idx <- setdiff(1:nrow(train_data), unique(idx))
      test_boot <- train_data[oob_idx, ]
      
      rf_tune <- train(
        x = train_boot %>% select(-cluster),
        y = train_boot$cluster,
        method = "ranger",
        metric = "Accuracy",
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        trControl = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 3),
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation",
        always.split.variables = clinical_covar
      )
      
      best <- rf_tune$bestTune
      
      if (nrow(test_boot) > 0) {
        pred <- predict(rf_tune, newdata = test_boot)
        acc <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_boot$cluster)$overall["Accuracy"]
      } else {
        acc <- NA
      }
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        mtry = best$mtry,
        splitrule = best$splitrule,
        min.node.size = best$min.node.size,
        Accuracy = acc
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(bootstrap = i, mtry = NA, splitrule = NA, min.node.size = NA, Accuracy = NA)
    })
  }

  # ---- 6. Seleccionar mejor conjunto de hiperparámetros ----
  best_params <- bootstrap_tuning %>%
    group_by(mtry, splitrule, min.node.size) %>%
    summarise(MeanAcc = mean(Accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(MeanAcc)) %>%
    slice(1)

  cat("Mejores hiperparámetros seleccionados:\n")
  print(best_params)

  # ---- 7. Entrenamiento final con hiperparámetros óptimos ----
  rf_final <- ranger(
    formula = cluster ~ .,
    data = train_data,
    mtry = best_params$mtry,
    splitrule = best_params$splitrule,
    min.node.size = best_params$min.node.size,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
  )

  # ---- 8. Evaluación final ----
  pred_final <- predict(rf_final, data = test_data)$predictions
  final_cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_final, test_data$cluster)

  if (is.matrix(final_cm$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(final_cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- final_cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }

  # ---- 9. IC 95% de métricas bootstrap ----
  acc_values <- na.omit(bootstrap_tuning$Accuracy)
  acc_ci <- quantile(acc_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

  # ---- 10. Formatear importancia de variables (CORREGIDO) ----
  # Usamos enframe() para obtener un tibble Variable / Importance correcto
  var_imp <- tibble::enframe(rf_final$variable.importance, name = "Variable", value = "Importance") %>%
    arrange(desc(Importance))

  # ---- 11. Resultado final ----
  list(
    BestParams = best_params,
    FinalModel = rf_final,
    FinalConfusionMatrix = final_cm,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapTuning = bootstrap_tuning,
    AccuracyCI95 = acc_ci,
    VariableImportance = var_imp
  )
}



```

```{r eval=FALSE}
saveRDS(PPMI_exp_M0, "PPMI_exp_M0_for_pred_K")
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
results_age <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = Covariates,
  clinical_covar = "age_at_baseline",
  k = k,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = n_boots,

)
```

## NO MOTOR   
```{r}


n_boots <- 25

k <- 3


evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_Non_Motor <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 5,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(60,30,10),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 10,
  ntrees_select = 500
  
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  # Preparar covariables clínicas
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  
  # Clustering
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_non_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_non_motor$cluster)
  
  # Preparar datos modelado
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # Quitar genes altamente correlacionados
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(., var = "sample_id")
  
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(
        covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id),
        by = "sample_id"
      )
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))

    
  # Transformar covariable si es factor o carácter binario
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      # Obtener niveles excluyendo NA
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", clinical_covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }

  
  # Split train/test
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  # Validación cruzada
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = 3,
    repeats = 1,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
    allowParallel = TRUE
  )
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    # mtry = seq(2, sqrt(ncol(train_data)-1), length.out = 3) %>% floor(),
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )
  
  # Entrenamiento
  set.seed(123)
  rf_model <- train(
    x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
    y = train_data$cluster,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
    )
  
  # Predicciones
  test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
  conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
  
  if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(conf_matrix$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }
  
  # Bootstrap
  bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                               .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      rf_boot <- ranger(
        formula = cluster ~ .,
        data = train_data[idx, ],
        mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation",
        always.split.variables = clinical_covar
      )
      pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
      cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
      
      bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
        mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
      }
      
      data.frame(
        Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
        Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
        BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
    })
  }
  
  # Resultado
  list(
    Model = rf_model,
    ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
    BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance

  )
}




```


```{r}


n_boots <- 25

k <- 3

evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_Non_Motor <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 10,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(60, 30, 10),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 10,
  ntrees_select = 500
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  require(tibble)   # <--- necesario para enframe() y rownames_to_column()
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # ---- 1. Preparar datos ----
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  # ---- 2. Clustering sobre el score ----
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # ---- 3. Filtrado de genes altamente correlacionados ----
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id")
  
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id), by = "sample_id")
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))
  
  # Transformar covariable si es binaria
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", clinical_covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }

  # ---- 4. Split train/test ----
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data  <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )

  # ---- 5. Bootstrap interno para tuning ----
  cat("Iniciando bootstrap interno para selección de hiperparámetros...\n")
  bootstrap_tuning <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                              .packages = c("ranger", "caret", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      train_boot <- train_data[idx, ]
      oob_idx <- setdiff(1:nrow(train_data), unique(idx))
      test_boot <- train_data[oob_idx, ]
      
      rf_tune <- train(
        x = train_boot %>% select(-cluster),
        y = train_boot$cluster,
        method = "ranger",
        metric = "Accuracy",
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        trControl = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 3),
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation",
        always.split.variables = clinical_covar
      )
      
      best <- rf_tune$bestTune
      
      if (nrow(test_boot) > 0) {
        pred <- predict(rf_tune, newdata = test_boot)
        acc <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_boot$cluster)$overall["Accuracy"]
      } else {
        acc <- NA
      }
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        mtry = best$mtry,
        splitrule = best$splitrule,
        min.node.size = best$min.node.size,
        Accuracy = acc
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(bootstrap = i, mtry = NA, splitrule = NA, min.node.size = NA, Accuracy = NA)
    })
  }

  # ---- 6. Seleccionar mejor conjunto de hiperparámetros ----
  best_params <- bootstrap_tuning %>%
    group_by(mtry, splitrule, min.node.size) %>%
    summarise(MeanAcc = mean(Accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(MeanAcc)) %>%
    slice(1)

  cat("Mejores hiperparámetros seleccionados:\n")
  print(best_params)

  # ---- 7. Entrenamiento final con hiperparámetros óptimos ----
  rf_final <- ranger(
    formula = cluster ~ .,
    data = train_data,
    mtry = best_params$mtry,
    splitrule = best_params$splitrule,
    min.node.size = best_params$min.node.size,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
  )

  # ---- 8. Evaluación final ----
  pred_final <- predict(rf_final, data = test_data)$predictions
  final_cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_final, test_data$cluster)

  if (is.matrix(final_cm$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(final_cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- final_cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }

  # ---- 9. IC 95% de métricas bootstrap ----
  acc_values <- na.omit(bootstrap_tuning$Accuracy)
  acc_ci <- quantile(acc_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

  # ---- 10. Formatear importancia de variables (CORREGIDO) ----
  # Usamos enframe() para obtener un tibble Variable / Importance correcto
  var_imp <- tibble::enframe(rf_final$variable.importance, name = "Variable", value = "Importance") %>%
    arrange(desc(Importance))

  # ---- 11. Resultado final ----
  list(
    BestParams = best_params,
    FinalModel = rf_final,
    FinalConfusionMatrix = final_cm,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapTuning = bootstrap_tuning,
    AccuracyCI95 = acc_ci,
    VariableImportance = var_imp
  )
}



```



```{r}


results_NoCov_Non_Motor_k2 <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_Non_Motor(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 2,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = n_boots,
  n_cores = 4
)

  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,

saveRDS(results_NoCov_Non_Motor_k3, "progression_prediction_RF_k3_mtry_plus_NoCov_Non_Motor_reactome")

results_NoCov_Non_Motor_k4 <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_Non_Motor(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 4,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = n_boots,
  n_cores = 4
)
```

## Predicción 1 VS 1

No se tendrá en cuenta en principio

```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_ovo <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 5,
  n_cores = 2
) {
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  require(purrr)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)

  # -------------------------
  # Preparar datos expresión y covariables
  # -------------------------
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(sample_id = rownames(.),
           participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
    select(-sample_id)

  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  # -------------------------
  # Clustering sobre progresión
  # -------------------------
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_wide <- df_long %>%
    arrange(participant_id, Visit) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Visit, values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile, names_prefix = "Visit_")

  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(S0 = Visit_0,
           diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
           diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
           diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24) %>%
    select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)

  data_filtered <- df_diff[, -1]
  data_filtered <- data_filtered[, apply(data_filtered, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)

  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>% select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))

  # -------------------------
  # Filtrado de genes correlacionados
  # -------------------------
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  high_cor <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix)) %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)

  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column("sample_id")

  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")

  if (!is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id), by = "sample_id")
  }

  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-sample_id) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))

  # -------------------------
  # Función interna 1vs1
  # -------------------------
  pairwise_results <- list()
  cluster_levels <- levels(df_model$cluster)
  pairs <- combn(cluster_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)

  for (pair in pairs) {
    pair_name <- paste(pair, collapse = "_vs_")

    # Filtrar datos
    df_pair <- df_model %>% filter(cluster %in% pair)
    df_pair$cluster <- droplevels(df_pair$cluster)

    # Binarizar covariable si es necesario
    if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
      cov_vals <- df_pair[[clinical_covar]]
      if (is.factor(cov_vals) || is.character(cov_vals)) {
        levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(cov_vals))
        if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
          df_pair[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_pair[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
        } else {
          warning(paste("La covariable", clinical_covar, "tiene más de 2 niveles. Se omite en", pair_name))
          df_pair[[clinical_covar]] <- NULL
        }
      }
    }

    # Train/test split
    set.seed(123)
    train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_pair$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_pair[train_idx, ]
    test_data <- df_pair[-train_idx, ]

    # Validación cruzada
    ctrl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                         number = 3, repeats = 1,
                         classProbs = TRUE,
                         summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
                         allowParallel = TRUE)

    tune_grid <- expand.grid(mtry = c(60, 30, 10),
                             splitrule = "gini",
                             min.node.size = 10)

    # Entrenar modelo
    rf_model <- train(
      x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
      y = train_data$cluster,
      method = "ranger",
      metric = "ROC",
      tuneGrid = tune_grid,
      trControl = ctrl,
      num.trees = 500,
      importance = "permutation",
      always.split.variables = clinical_covar
    )

    # Evaluar en test
    test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
    conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
    bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
      # multiclase → promedio de sensibilidad
      mean(conf_matrix$byClass[, "Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      # binaria → usa Balanced Accuracy directamente
      conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
    }
    
    # Bootstrap
    bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                             .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
      tryCatch({
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
        rf_boot <- ranger(
          formula = cluster ~ .,
          data = train_data[idx, ],
          mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
          num.trees = 500,
          importance = "none",
          always.split.variables = clinical_covar
        )
        pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
        cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
    
        bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
          mean(cm$byClass[, "Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
        }
    
        data.frame(
          Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
          Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
          BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
      })
    }


    # Guardar resultados
    pairwise_results[[pair_name]] <- list(
      Pair = pair,
      Model = rf_model,
      ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
      BalancedAccuracyTest = bal_acc,
      BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
      BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance
    )
  }

  return(pairwise_results)
}


results_1vs1_NoCov <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger_ovo(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 5,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = n_boots,
  n_cores = 8
)


saveRDS(results_1vs1_NoCov, "perc_pred_noCov")


# Recolectamos los resultados en un solo data.frame
boot_all <- lapply(names(results_1vs1_NoCov), function(pair_name) {
  boot_df <- results_1vs1_NoCov[[pair_name]]$BootstrapMetrics
  boot_df$Comparison <- pair_name
  boot_df$PValue <- results_1vs1_NoCov[[pair_name]]$ConfusionMatrix$overall["AccuracyPValue"]
  return(boot_df)
}) %>% bind_rows()


label_df <- data.frame(
  Comparison = names(results_1vs1_NoCov),
  PValue = sapply(results_1vs1_NoCov, function(x) x$ConfusionMatrix$overall["AccuracyPValue"])
) %>%
  mutate(
    PValueLabel = paste0("p = ", signif(PValue, 2)),
    LabelY = 1.05
  )


ggplot(boot_all, aes(x = Comparison, y = BalancedAccuracy)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#6BAED6", alpha = 0.85, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = label_df, aes(x = Comparison, y = LabelY, label = PValueLabel),
            size = 3.2, vjust = 0) +
  ylim(0, 1.1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Pairwise Balanced Accuracy (1 vs 1)",
    x = "Cluster Comparison",
    y = "Balanced Accuracy"
  )


```

## Covariates only

```{r}

evaluate_clusters_with_clinical_covariates_only <- function(
  severity_scores,
  covariates_data,
  clinical_covariates_vector,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 5,
  n_cores = 2
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # Clustering sobre severidad
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  
  # Preparar dataframe final con covariables clínicas
  covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
    filter(visit_name == "M0") %>%
    mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
    select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covariates_vector)) %>%
    distinct()
  
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster)
  
  df_model <- cluster_df %>%
    inner_join(covariates_processed, by = "participant_id") %>%
    select(-sample_id) %>%
    mutate(
      cluster = factor(paste0("Cluster_", cluster))
    )

  
  # Convertir variables binarias si procede
  for (covar in clinical_covariates_vector) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[covar]])) {
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop(paste0("La covariable categórica '", covar, "' tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA)."))
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }
  
  # Quitar filas con NA en predictores
  df_model <- na.omit(df_model)
  
  # Split train/test
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  # Validación cruzada
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = 3,
    repeats = 1,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
    allowParallel = TRUE
  )
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = seq(1, sqrt(ncol(train_data)-1), length.out = 3) %>% floor(),
    splitrule = "gini",
    min.node.size = 1
  )
  
  # Entrenamiento
  set.seed(123)
  rf_model <- train(
    x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
    y = train_data$cluster,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    num.trees = 100,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  # Predicciones test
  test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
  conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
  
  if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(conf_matrix$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }
  
  # Bootstrap
  bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                               .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      rf_boot <- ranger(
        formula = cluster ~ .,
        data = train_data[idx, ],
        mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
        num.trees = 100,
        importance = "impurity"
      )
      pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
      cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
      
      bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
        mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
      }
      
      data.frame(
        Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
        Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
        BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
    })
  }
  
  # Resultado
  list(
    Model = rf_model,
    ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
    BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}


# Vector de covariables clínicas
covariables_indiv <- c(
  "age_at_baseline",
  "sex",
  "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage",
  "mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score",
  "mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score",
  "moca_total_score",
  "rbd_summary_score",
  "neutrophils_mature",
  "Abeta",
  "prognosis_status"
)

# Lista donde guardaremos TODOS los resultados
results_clinical_only <- list()

# Primero: modelo con TODAS las covariables
cat("Procesando modelo con todas las covariables juntas...\n")

results_clinical_only[["all_clinical"]] <- evaluate_clusters_with_clinical_covariates_only(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  covariates_data = Covariates,
  clinical_covariates_vector = covariables_indiv,
  k = 5,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 100,
  n_cores = 4
)

# Después: modelos con cada covariable individual
for (covar in covariables_indiv) {
  cat("Procesando covariable:", covar, "\n")
  
  res <- evaluate_clusters_with_clinical_covariates_only(
    severity_scores = severity_scores,
    covariates_data = Covariates,
    clinical_covariates_vector = covar,
    k = 5,
    test_size = 0.2,
    n_bootstrap = 100,
    n_cores = 4
  )
  
  results_clinical_only[[covar]] <- res
}




# Crear tabla resumen con Accuracy y P-Value
accuracy_pvals <- data.frame(
  Covariable = names(results_clinical_only),
  Accuracy = sapply(results_clinical_only, function(x) x$ConfusionMatrix$overall["Accuracy"]),
  AccuracyPValue = sapply(results_clinical_only, function(x) x$ConfusionMatrix$overall["AccuracyPValue"])
)

# Ver tabla
print(accuracy_pvals)

# Filtrar los que son significativamente mejores que NIR
accuracy_pvals_significant <- accuracy_pvals %>%
  filter(AccuracyPValue < 0.05)

# Mostrar resultados significativos
print(accuracy_pvals_significant)
```

## SHAP Values


```{r eval = FALSE}

Model <- results_NoCov$Model$finalModel

trainingData <- results_NoCov$Model$trainingData

labels <- trainingData$.outcome

X_train <- trainingData[, setdiff(names(trainingData), ".outcome")]

predict(Model, data = X_train)$predictions %>% colnames()


# Con fastShap

library(fastshap)

colnames(predict(Model, data = X_train)$predictions)

predict_prob_class1 <- function(object, newdata) {
  preds <- predict(object, data = newdata)$predictions
  as.numeric(preds[,"X1"])
}

shap_values <- fastshap::explain(
  object = Model,
  X = X_train,
  pred_wrapper = predict_prob_class1,
  nsim = 50,   # Número de permutaciones por variable (ajusta según precisión/velocidad)
  adjust = TRUE # Ajusta baseline
)


saveRDS(shap_values)




# Con IML

predict_function <- function(model, newdata) {
  preds <- predict(model, data = newdata)$predictions
  # Devuelve un data frame con las probabilidades de todas las clases
  as.data.frame(preds)
}


library(iml)

predictor <- Predictor$new(
  model = Model,
  data = X_train,
  y = labels,
  predict.function = predict_function,
  type = "prob"
)

shapley <- Shapley$new(predictor, x.interest = X_train[1, ])

plot(shapley)

shap_values_df <- shapley$results

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(shap_values_df, aes(x = reorder(feature, phi), y = phi, fill = phi > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("red", "steelblue")) +
  labs(
    title = "SHAP values for observation 1",
    x = "Feature",
    y = "SHAP value (contribution)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

feat_imp <- FeatureImp$new(predictor, loss = "ce") # cross-entropy loss
plot(feat_imp)
```

```{r}
  Neuro_K2 = pred_Neuro_K2,
  Sleep_K4 = pred_Sleep_K4,

  NonMotorOverall_K3 = pred_NonMotorOverall_K3
)

# Construir tabla con métricas y p-value Acc > NIR
performance_summary <- lapply(names(models_list), function(model_name) {
  model <- models_list[[model_name]]
  cm <- model$ConfusionMatrix
  
  tibble(
    Model = model_name,
    Accuracy_Test = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
    NIR = cm$overall["AccuracyNull"],
    pvalue_Acc_NIR = cm$overall["AccuracyPValue"],   # p-value Accuracy > NIR
    BalancedAccuracy_Test = model$BalancedAccuracyTest,
    BalancedAccuracy_Bootstrap = model$BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

# Mostrar tabla
# performance_summary



library(DT)
library(dplyr)

# Suponiendo que performance_summary ya existe
# Redondear a 3 cifras significativas en todas las columnas numéricas
performance_summary_fmt <- performance_summary %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(., 3))) %>%
  mutate(pvalue_Acc_NIR = ifelse(pvalue_Acc_NIR < 0.05,
                                 paste0("<b>", pvalue_Acc_NIR, "</b>"),
                                 as.character(pvalue_Acc_NIR)))

# Mostrar tabla en datatable con renderizado HTML
datatable(performance_summary_fmt, escape = FALSE,
          options = list(pageLength = 20))
```

# Confounders percentil change


```{r eval=FALSE}

predict_percentile_change_with_covariates_ranger <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  train_visits = 0,
  predict_visits = NULL,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 100,
  n_cores = 10,
  mtry_select = c(60, 30, 10),
  splitrule_select = "variance",
  min.node.size_select = 5,
  ntrees_select = 500,
  remove_high_cor = TRUE,
  cor_threshold = 0.95
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  if (is.null(predict_visits)) {
    predict_visits <- train_visits
  }
  
  # Calcular percentiles por visita
  severity_scores <- severity_scores %>%
    group_by(Visit) %>%
    mutate(
      Motor_Score_raw_percentile = rank(Motor_Score_raw) / n(),
      Motor_percentile_mod = rank(Motor_Score_mod) / n()
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_processed <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    select(-sample_id)
  
  # Quitar genes altamente correlacionados si se solicita
  if (remove_high_cor) {
    cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_processed %>% select(-participant_id))
    cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
    high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > cor_threshold, Var1 != Var2)
    genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
    genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_processed %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
    
    PPMI_exp_processed <- PPMI_exp_processed %>%
      select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining))
  }
  
  # Preparar covariables clínicas
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }
  
  # Generar combinaciones de visitas a predecir
  combinations <- expand.grid(
    train_visit = train_visits,
    predict_visit = predict_visits,
    score_type = c("raw", "mod"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    filter(predict_visit > train_visit)
  
  # Función para entrenar y evaluar modelo
  train_and_evaluate <- function(df_model, target_var, test_size) {
    df_model <- df_model %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]]))
    
    set.seed(123)
    train_index <- createDataPartition(df_model[[target_var]], p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
    train_data <- df_model[train_index, ]
    test_data <- df_model[-train_index, ]
    
    # Configurar validación cruzada
    ctrl <- trainControl(
      method = "repeatedcv",
      number = 3,
      repeats = 1,
      allowParallel = TRUE
    )
    
    tune_grid <- expand.grid(
      mtry = mtry_select,
      splitrule = splitrule_select,
      min.node.size = min.node.size_select
    )
    
    
    # Entrenar modelo
    set.seed(123)
    rf_model <- train(
      x = train_data %>% select(-all_of(target_var)),
      y = train_data[[target_var]],
      method = "ranger",
      metric = "RMSE",
      tuneGrid = tune_grid,
      trControl = ctrl,
      num.trees = ntrees_select,
      importance = "permutation",
      always.split.variables = clinical_covar
    )
    
    # Evaluar en test
    predictions <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
    y_test <- test_data[[target_var]]
    
    mse <- mean((y_test - predictions)^2)
    varianza_y <- var(y_test)
    rmse <- sqrt(mse)
    desviacion_y <- sd(y_test)
    r_squared <- 1 - (mse / varianza_y)
    
    # Bootstrap para intervalos de confianza
    bootstrap_results <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = 'rbind',
                                .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
      tryCatch({
        idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
        rf_boot <- ranger(
          formula = as.formula(paste(target_var, "~ .")),
          data = train_data[idx, ],
          mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
          splitrule = rf_model$bestTune$splitrule,
          min.node.size = rf_model$bestTune$min.node.size,
          num.trees = ntrees_select,
          importance = "permutation",
          always.split.variables = clinical_covar
        )
        pred_test <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
        r2 <- 1 - (mean((y_test - pred_test)^2) / var(y_test))
        data.frame(Rsquared = r2, RMSE = sqrt(mean((y_test - pred_test)^2)))
      }, error = function(e) {
        data.frame(Rsquared = NA, RMSE = NA)
      })
    }
    
    list(
      Model = rf_model,
      MSE = mse,
      Variance = varianza_y,
      RMSE = rmse,
      SD = desviacion_y,
      Rsquared = r_squared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = mean(bootstrap_results$Rsquared, na.rm = TRUE),
      Rsquared_bootstrap_ci = quantile(bootstrap_results$Rsquared, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
      RMSE_bootstrap_mean = mean(bootstrap_results$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      RMSE_bootstrap_ci = quantile(bootstrap_results$RMSE, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE),
      VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance,
      n_predictors = ncol(train_data) - 1
    )
  }
  
  # Procesar cada combinación de visitas
  process_combination <- function(train_visit, predict_visit, score_type) {
    percentile_col <- ifelse(score_type == "raw", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile", "Motor_percentile_mod")
    
    # Preparar datos para el modelo
    df_model <- severity_scores %>%
      filter(Visit %in% c(train_visit, predict_visit)) %>%
      arrange(participant_id, Visit) %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      filter(n() == 2) %>% # Solo pacientes con ambas visitas
      summarize(
        baseline_percentile = .data[[percentile_col]][Visit == train_visit],
        followup_percentile = .data[[percentile_col]][Visit == predict_visit],
        percentile_change = followup_percentile - baseline_percentile,
        sample_id = sample_id[Visit == train_visit]  # Añadir sample_id desde los datos originales
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      inner_join(
        PPMI_exp_processed %>% 
          filter(participant_id %in% severity_scores$participant_id[severity_scores$Visit == train_visit]),
        by = "participant_id"
      )
    
    # Añadir covariables si están disponibles
    if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
      df_model <- df_model %>%
        inner_join(
          covariates_processed %>% 
            filter(participant_id %in% severity_scores$participant_id[severity_scores$Visit == train_visit]),
          by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id")  # Unión explícita por sample_id
        )
    }
    
    # Transformar covariables categóricas binarias
    if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
      for (covar in clinical_covar) {
        if (is.factor(df_model[[covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[covar]])) {
          levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[covar]]))
          if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
            df_model[[covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Eliminar columnas no predictoras
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      select(-sample_id, -baseline_percentile, -followup_percentile)
    
    # Entrenar y evaluar modelo
    results <- train_and_evaluate(df_model, "percentile_change", test_size)
    
    # Preparar resultados
    data.frame(
      train_visit = train_visit,
      predict_visit = predict_visit,
      score_type = score_type,
      target = "percentile_change",
      Rsquared_original = results$Rsquared,
      Rsquared_bootstrap_mean = results$Rsquared_bootstrap_mean,
      Rsquared_lower_ci = results$Rsquared_bootstrap_ci[1],
      Rsquared_upper_ci = results$Rsquared_bootstrap_ci[2],
      RMSE_original = results$RMSE,
      RMSE_bootstrap_mean = results$RMSE_bootstrap_mean,
      RMSE_lower_ci = results$RMSE_bootstrap_ci[1],
      RMSE_upper_ci = results$RMSE_bootstrap_ci[2],
      n_predictors = results$n_predictors,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Ejecutar para todas las combinaciones
  all_results <- pmap_dfr(combinations, process_combination)
  
  return(all_results)
}
```
