# Comparación de patrones de progresión (grupos de progresión) con patrones de empeoramiento de variables clínicas. 


```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_clustering_from_covariates <- function(Covariates, 
                                                participant_col = "participant_id",
                                                visit_col = "visit_name",
                                                clinical_vars,
                                                k_range = 2:10) {
  
  Covariates_fil <- Covariates %>% filter(.data[[participant_col]] %in% Covariates_score$participant_id)
  

  results_distances <- data.frame()

  for (k in k_range) {
    # --- 1. Selección de columnas necesarias ---
    df_long <- Covariates[, c(participant_col, visit_col, clinical_vars)]
    
    # --- 2. Reordenar y pasar a formato wide por variable ---
    df_long <- df_long[order(df_long[[participant_col]], df_long[[visit_col]]), ]
    
    # Usamos pivot_wider para cada variable
    df_wide <- df_long %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = {{visit_col}}, values_from = all_of(clinical_vars),
                         names_sep = "_Visit_")
    
    # --- 3. Cálculo de diferencias entre visitas por cada variable ---
    id_col <- df_wide[[participant_col]]
    df_wide <- df_wide %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(participant_col))  # quitar ID temporalmente
    
    # Agrupar por variable
    variable_names <- clinical_vars
    visit_suffixes <- c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
    all_visit_columns <- expand.grid(variable = variable_names, visit = visit_suffixes) %>%
      mutate(full_name = paste(variable, "Visit", visit, sep = "_"))
    
    # Seleccionar solo columnas que existen
    valid_columns <- intersect(all_visit_columns$full_name, colnames(df_wide))
    df_wide <- df_wide[, valid_columns]
    
    # Calcular diferencias
    diff_data <- data.frame(participant_id = id_col)
    
    for (var in variable_names) {
      col_0 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M0")
      col_12 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M12")
      col_24 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M24")
      col_36 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M36")
      
      if (all(c(col_0, col_12, col_24, col_36) %in% colnames(df_wide))) {
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_0_12")]] <- df_wide[[col_12]] - df_wide[[col_0]]
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_12_24")]] <- df_wide[[col_24]] - df_wide[[col_12]]
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_24_36")]] <- df_wide[[col_36]] - df_wide[[col_24]]
      }
    }
    
    # --- 4. Escalado y filtrado ---
    data_to_scale <- diff_data[, -1]
    data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
    data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
    
    # --- 5. Clustering ---
    km_cluster <- kmeans(data_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
    cluster_labels <- km_cluster$cluster
    cluster_sizes <- table(cluster_labels)
    
    if (any(cluster_sizes < 2)) {
      message(paste("Saltando k =", k, "por clusters pequeños"))
      next
    }
    
    # --- 6. Métricas ---
    dist_kmeans <- dist(data_scaled, method = "euclidean")
    stats_kmeans <- fpc::cluster.stats(dist_kmeans, cluster_labels)
    db_index_kmeans <- clusterSim::index.DB(data_scaled, cluster_labels, d = dist_kmeans)$DB
    
    results_distances <- rbind(results_distances, data.frame(
      k = k,
      average_within = stats_kmeans$average.within,
      average_between = stats_kmeans$average.between,
      within_between_ratio = stats_kmeans$wb.ratio,
      average_silhouette = stats_kmeans$avg.silwidth,
      davies_bouldin = db_index_kmeans,
      method = "covariate_changes",
      variables_used = paste(clinical_vars, collapse = "+")
    ))
  }
  
  return(results_distances)
}

  clinical_vars = c("moca_total_score"),
```

## Evaluate_clustering_from_covariates() (devuelve métricas + asignaciones)
```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_clustering_from_covariates <- function(Covariates, 
                                                participant_col = "participant_id",
                                                visit_col = "visit_name",
                                                clinical_vars,
                                                k_range = 2:10) {
  
  # Covariates_fil <- Covariates %>% filter(.data[[participant_col]] %in% Covariates_score$participant_id)
  # Covariates <- Covariates_fil

  results_distances <- data.frame()
  all_clusters <- list()

  for (k in k_range) {
    df_long <- Covariates[, c(participant_col, visit_col, clinical_vars)]
    df_long <- df_long[order(df_long[[participant_col]], df_long[[visit_col]]), ]
    
    df_wide <- df_long %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = {{visit_col}}, values_from = all_of(clinical_vars),
                         names_glue = "{.value}_Visit_{visit_name}")
    
    id_col <- df_wide[[participant_col]]
    df_wide <- df_wide %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(participant_col))
    
    variable_names <- clinical_vars
    visit_suffixes <- c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")
    all_visit_columns <- expand.grid(variable = variable_names, visit = visit_suffixes) %>%
      mutate(full_name = paste(variable, "Visit", visit, sep = "_"))
    
    valid_columns <- intersect(all_visit_columns$full_name, colnames(df_wide))
    df_wide <- df_wide[, valid_columns]
    
    diff_data <- data.frame(participant_id = id_col)
    for (var in variable_names) {
      col_0 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M0")
      col_12 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M12")
      col_24 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M24")
      col_36 <- paste0(var, "_Visit_M36")
      
      if (all(c(col_0, col_12, col_24, col_36) %in% colnames(df_wide))) {
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_0_12")]] <- df_wide[[col_12]] - df_wide[[col_0]]
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_12_24")]] <- df_wide[[col_24]] - df_wide[[col_12]]
        diff_data[[paste0(var, "_diff_24_36")]] <- df_wide[[col_36]] - df_wide[[col_24]]
      }
    }
    
    data_to_scale <- diff_data[, -1]
    data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
    data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
    
    km_cluster <- kmeans(data_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
    cluster_labels <- km_cluster$cluster
    cluster_sizes <- table(cluster_labels)
    
    if (any(cluster_sizes < 2)) {
      message(paste("Saltando k =", k, "por clusters pequeños"))
      next
    }
    
    dist_kmeans <- dist(data_scaled, method = "euclidean")
    stats_kmeans <- fpc::cluster.stats(dist_kmeans, cluster_labels)
    db_index_kmeans <- clusterSim::index.DB(data_scaled, cluster_labels, d = dist_kmeans)$DB
    
    results_distances <- rbind(results_distances, data.frame(
      k = k,
      average_within = stats_kmeans$average.within,
      average_between = stats_kmeans$average.between,
      within_between_ratio = stats_kmeans$wb.ratio,
      average_silhouette = stats_kmeans$avg.silwidth,
      davies_bouldin = db_index_kmeans,
      method = "covariate_changes",
      variables_used = paste(clinical_vars, collapse = "+")
    ))
    
    all_clusters[[as.character(k)]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = id_col,
      cluster = cluster_labels,
      k = k
    )
  }
  
  return(list(metrics = results_distances, cluster_assignments = all_clusters))
}

## Evaluate_clustering_progression() (también adaptada para devolver clusters)

evaluate_clustering_progression <- function(Covariates, Covariates_score, 
                                            evaluation_covariates, 
                                            progression_column = "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative",
                                            k_range = 2:20) {
  
  results_distances <- data.frame()
  all_clusters <- list()
  
  for (k in k_range) {
    Covariates_scores_all <- Covariates_score
    
    df_long <- Covariates_scores_all[, c("participant_id", "Visit", progression_column)]
    colnames(df_long)[3] <- "progression_score"
    df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
    
    df_wide <- tidyr::pivot_wider(df_long_cluster, names_from = Visit, values_from = progression_score, names_prefix = "Visit_")
    
    df_diff <- df_wide %>%
      mutate(
        S0 = Visit_0,
        diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
        diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
        diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
    
    data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
    data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
    data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
    
    km_cluster <- kmeans(data_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
    df_cluster <- df_diff["participant_id"] %>% dplyr::mutate(cluster_motor = km_cluster$cluster)
    
    cluster_labels <- df_cluster$cluster_motor
    cluster_sizes <- table(cluster_labels)
    if (any(cluster_sizes < 2)) {
      message(paste("Saltando k =", k, "porque al menos un cluster tiene menos de 2 individuos."))
      next
    }
    
    dist_kmeans <- dist(data_scaled, method = "euclidean")
    stats_kmeans <- fpc::cluster.stats(dist_kmeans, cluster_labels)
    db_index_kmeans <- clusterSim::index.DB(data_scaled, cluster_labels, d = dist_kmeans)$DB
    
    results_distances <- rbind(results_distances, data.frame(
      k = k,
      average_within = stats_kmeans$average.within,
      average_between = stats_kmeans$average.between,
      within_between_ratio = stats_kmeans$wb.ratio,
      average_silhouette = stats_kmeans$avg.silwidth,
      davies_bouldin = db_index_kmeans,
      method = "cluster_distances"
    ))
    
    all_clusters[[as.character(k)]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_cluster$participant_id,
      cluster = df_cluster$cluster_motor,
      k = k
    )
  }
  
  return(list(metrics = results_distances, cluster_assignments = all_clusters))
}




compare_clusterings <- function(clustering_covars, clustering_scores) {
  library(mclust)  # For adjustedRandIndex
  library(aricode) # For NMI
  
  ks_common <- intersect(names(clustering_covars), names(clustering_scores))
  
  results <- lapply(ks_common, function(k) {
    df1 <- clustering_covars[[k]]
    df2 <- clustering_scores[[k]]
    
    merged <- merge(df1, df2, by = "participant_id", suffixes = c("_covars", "_scores"))
    
    ari <- adjustedRandIndex(merged$cluster_covars, merged$cluster_scores)
    nmi <- NMI(merged$cluster_covars, merged$cluster_scores)
    
    data.frame(k = as.numeric(k), ARI = ari, NMI = nmi)
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  return(results)
}
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
Risk_var <- c("mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score","code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment","code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis","code_upd2103_depressed_mood","code_upd2104_anxious_mood","code_upd2105_apathy","code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features", "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score","mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score","Tremor_Right_UM","Tremor_Left_UM","Tremor_all_Um","PIGD_UM", "ess_summary_score", "moca_total_score", "Abeta", "p-Tau", "Tau", "rbd_summary_score", "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage", "apoe", "mapt", "AGE_ONSET", "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score")

all_covs <- intersect(names(Covariates_imputado), Risk_var)

# names(Covariates_imputado) 

vars_motor <- Motor
vars_non_motor <- Non_Motor
vars_all <- all_covs


evaluate_subsets_vs_progression <- function(Covariates, Covariates_score, k_range = 2:6) {
  
  Covariates_fil <- Covariates %>% 
  filter(participant_id %in% paste("PP-", Covariates_score$participant_id, sep = "") & 
         visit_name %in% c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"))
  
  print(Covariates_fil)
  
  # Define subconjuntos
  subsets <- list(
    Motor = vars_motor,
    Non_Motor = vars_non_motor,
    All = vars_all
  )
  
  # Clustering de referencia (progresión)
  result_scores <- evaluate_clustering_progression(
    Covariates = Covariates_fil,
    Covariates_score = Covariates_score,
    evaluation_covariates = NULL,
    progression_column = "Motor_Score_raw_percentile",  # <- usa el nombre real
    k_range = k_range
  )
  
  result_scores$cluster_assignments <- lapply(result_scores$cluster_assignments, function(df) {
  df$participant_id <- paste0("PP-", df$participant_id)
  return(df)
})
  
  # str(result_scores$cluster_assignments)
  # 
  # Evaluar cada subconjunto
  comparison_all <- list()
  
  for (subset_name in names(subsets)) {
    cat("Evaluando subset:", subset_name, "\n")
    
    result_covars <- evaluate_clustering_from_covariates(
      Covariates = Covariates_fil,
      clinical_vars = subsets[[subset_name]],
      k_range = k_range
    )
    
    # str(result_covars$cluster_assignments)

    comparison <- compare_clusterings(
      clustering_covars = result_covars$cluster_assignments,
      clustering_scores = result_scores$cluster_assignments
    )
    
    comparison$Subset <- subset_name
    comparison_all[[subset_name]] <- comparison
  }
  
  # Combinar todos los resultados
  final_results <- bind_rows(comparison_all)
  return(final_results)
}


results_comparison <- evaluate_subsets_vs_progression(Covariates = Covariates_imputado, 
                                                      Covariates_score = severity_scores, 
                                                      k_range = 2:6)

ggplot(results_comparison, aes(x = k, y = ARI, color = Subset)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "ARI entre clusters de covariables vs progresión por subconjunto",
       y = "Adjusted Rand Index (ARI)", x = "Número de clusters (k)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(results_comparison, aes(x = k, y = NMI, color = Subset)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "NMI entre clusters de covariables vs progresión por subconjunto",
       y = "Normalized Mutual Information (NMI)", x = "Número de clusters (k)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_combinations_vs_progression <- function(Covariates, Covariates_score, 
                                                 all_variables, 
                                                 k_range = 2:6,
                                                 min_vars = 1, max_vars = 3) {
  
  Covariates_fil <- Covariates %>% 
    filter(participant_id %in% paste("PP-", Covariates_score$participant_id, sep = "") & 
             visit_name %in% c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"))
  
  # Clustering de referencia (progresión)
  result_scores <- evaluate_clustering_progression(
    Covariates = Covariates_fil,
    Covariates_score = Covariates_score,
    evaluation_covariates = NULL,
    progression_column = "Motor_Score_raw_percentile",
    k_range = k_range
  )
  
  result_scores$cluster_assignments <- lapply(result_scores$cluster_assignments, function(df) {
    df$participant_id <- paste0("PP-", df$participant_id)
    return(df)
  })
  
  # Generar todas las combinaciones posibles
  combinations_all <- list()
  for (i in min_vars:max_vars) {
    combs <- combn(all_variables, i, simplify = FALSE)
    combinations_all <- append(combinations_all, combs)
  }
  
  # Evaluar cada combinación
  comparison_all <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(combinations_all)) {
    subset_vars <- combinations_all[[i]]
    subset_name <- paste(subset_vars, collapse = " + ")
    cat("Evaluando combinación:", subset_name, "\n")
    
    result_covars <- evaluate_clustering_from_covariates(
      Covariates = Covariates_fil,
      clinical_vars = subset_vars,
      k_range = k_range
    )
    
    comparison <- compare_clusterings(
      clustering_covars = result_covars$cluster_assignments,
      clustering_scores = result_scores$cluster_assignments
    )
    
    comparison$Subset <- subset_name
    comparison_all[[i]] <- comparison
  }
  
  final_results <- bind_rows(comparison_all)
  return(final_results)
}


results_combos <- evaluate_combinations_vs_progression(
  Covariates = Covariates_imputado,
  Covariates_score = severity_scores,
  all_variables = all_covs,         # <- todas tus covariables disponibles
  k_range = 2:6,
  min_vars = 1,
  max_vars = 15                      # puedes subir a 4-5 si no hay muchas variables
)

saveRDS(results_combos, "results_combos_clinic_prog")
```

## Predict progression clusters using inter-visit clinical variation

```{r eval=FALSE}

evaluate_clusters_with_clinical_deltas <- function(
  severity_scores,
  clinical_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 5,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(10, 5, 2),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 1,
  ntrees_select = 500
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  
  
  
  clinical_data <- clinical_data %>% 
    filter(participant_id %in% paste0("PP-", Covariates_score$participant_id)) %>%
    filter(visit_name %in% c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"))
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # Preparar datos clínicos con deltas entre visitas
  clinical_long <- clinical_data %>%
    mutate(
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)),
      Visit = as.numeric(str_extract(visit_name, "\\d+"))
      ) %>%
    select(participant_id, Visit, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
    arrange(participant_id, Visit)
  
  # Crear deltas (cambios entre visitas)
  # Versión alternativa más explícita
  clinical_deltas <- clinical_long %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = Visit,
      values_from = all_of(clinical_covar),
      names_sep = "_"
    )
  
  # Para cada covariable clínica, calcular los deltas
  for(covar in clinical_covar) {
    clinical_deltas <- clinical_deltas %>%
      mutate(
        !!paste0(covar, "_delta_0_12") := !!sym(paste0(covar, "_12")) - !!sym(paste0(covar, "_0")),
        !!paste0(covar, "_delta_12_24") := !!sym(paste0(covar, "_24")) - !!sym(paste0(covar, "_12")),
        !!paste0(covar, "_delta_24_36") := !!sym(paste0(covar, "_36")) - !!sym(paste0(covar, "_24"))
      )
  }
  
  # Seleccionar solo las columnas de deltas
  clinical_deltas <- clinical_deltas %>%
    select(participant_id, matches("delta_"))
  
#############################################################################################################
  # Clustering basado en severity scores (igual que antes)
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", "Motor_Score_raw_percentile")]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = Motor_Score_raw_percentile,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster_motor <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster_motor$cluster)
  
  # Preparar datos para modelado
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # Combinar con los deltas clínicos
  df_model <- clinical_deltas %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id") %>%
    select(-participant_id) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))
  
  # Split train/test
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  # Validación cruzada
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = 3,
    repeats = 1,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
    allowParallel = TRUE
  )
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )
  
  # Entrenamiento
  set.seed(123)
  rf_model <- train(
    x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
    y = train_data$cluster,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation"
  )
  
  # Predicciones
  test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
  conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
  
  if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(conf_matrix$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }
  
  # Bootstrap
  bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                               .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      rf_boot <- ranger(
        formula = cluster ~ .,
        data = train_data[idx, ],
        mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation"
      )
      pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
      cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
      
      bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
        mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
      }
      
      data.frame(
        Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
        Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
        BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
    })
  }
  
  # Resultado
  list(
    Model = rf_model,
    ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
    BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance
  )
}



clin_covar_select <- Covariates_imputado %>%
  select(13:ncol(.)) %>%
  select_if(is.numeric) %>%
  colnames()


results_clust_pred_clinic <- evaluate_clusters_with_clinical_deltas(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  clinical_data = Covariates_imputado,
  clinical_covar = clin_covar_select,
  k = 2,
  test_size = 0.3,
  n_bootstrap = 100, mtry_select = 1:25, min.node.size_select = c(1, 5, 10)
)










 
```



# ***Relación prognosis con grupos de progresión

```{r}


# CovariatesM0 <- Covariates %>% filter(sample_id %in% rownames(PPMI_label_M0))


evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger <- function(
    severity_scores,
    expression_data,
    percentile_column = "Motor_percentile_raw",
    covariates_data = NULL,
    clinical_covar = NULL,
    test_covariates = NULL,
    k = 3,
    test_size = 0.2,
    n_bootstrap = 5,
    n_cores = 2,
    mtry_select = c(60, 30, 10),
    splitrule_select = "gini",
    min.node.size_select = 10,
    ntrees_select = 500
) {
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  require(broom)
  require(purrr)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # Preparar datos de expresión
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  # Preparar covariables clínicas
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }
  
  # Clustering
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", percentile_column)]
  colnames(df_long)[3] <- "score"
  df_long <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = score,
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster$cluster)
  
  # ===== NUEVA SECCIÓN: Tests estadísticos por visita =====
  cluster_tests_by_visit <- list()
  
  if (!is.null(test_covariates) && !is.null(covariates_data) && "visit_name" %in% colnames(covariates_data)) {
    
    # Obtener visitas únicas
    unique_visits <- unique(covariates_data$visit_name)
    unique_visits <- unique_visits[!is.na(unique_visits)]
    
    cluster_tests_by_visit <- map(unique_visits, function(visit) {
      message(paste("Realizando tests para visita:", visit))
      
      # Filtrar datos para la visita específica
      visit_cov_data <- covariates_data %>%
        filter(visit_name == visit) %>%
        mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))
      
      # Combinar con clusters
      cluster_visit_data <- df_diff %>%
        select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
        inner_join(visit_cov_data, by = "participant_id")
      
      # Realizar tests para cada covariable en esta visita
      visit_tests <- map(test_covariates, function(cov_name) {
        if (!cov_name %in% colnames(cluster_visit_data)) {
          return(list(
            variable = cov_name,
            test = "Variable not found",
            p_value = NA,
            statistic = NA,
            n_obs = 0
          ))
        }
        
        cov_data <- cluster_visit_data %>%
          select(cluster, all_of(cov_name)) %>%
          na.omit()
        
        if (nrow(cov_data) == 0) {
          return(list(
            variable = cov_name,
            test = "No data available",
            p_value = NA,
            statistic = NA,
            n_obs = 0
          ))
        }
        
        # Determinar tipo de variable y test apropiado
        if (is.numeric(cov_data[[cov_name]])) {
          # Test ANOVA para variables numéricas
          anova_result <- aov(as.formula(paste(cov_name, "~ cluster")), data = cov_data)
          anova_summary <- summary(anova_result)
          
          list(
            variable = cov_name,
            test = "ANOVA",
            p_value = anova_summary[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1],
            statistic = anova_summary[[1]]$`F value`[1],
            n_obs = nrow(cov_data),
            means = cov_data %>%
              group_by(cluster) %>%
              summarise(
                mean = mean(.data[[cov_name]], na.rm = TRUE),
                sd = sd(.data[[cov_name]], na.rm = TRUE),
                n = n()
              )
          )
          
        } else if (is.factor(cov_data[[cov_name]]) || is.character(cov_data[[cov_name]])) {
          # Test para variables categóricas
          contingency_table <- table(cov_data$cluster, cov_data[[cov_name]])
          
          # Verificar si hay suficientes datos
          if (any(contingency_table < 5)) {
            # Usar test exacto de Fisher si hay celdas con pocas observaciones
            fisher_result <- tryCatch({
              fisher.test(contingency_table)
            }, error = function(e) {
              list(p.value = NA)
            })
            
            list(
              variable = cov_name,
              test = "Fisher's Exact Test",
              p_value = fisher_result$p.value,
              statistic = NA,
              n_obs = nrow(cov_data),
              contingency_table = contingency_table
            )
          } else {
            chi_result <- tryCatch({
              chisq.test(contingency_table)
            }, error = function(e) {
              list(statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
            })
            
            list(
              variable = cov_name,
              test = "Chi-squared Test",
              p_value = chi_result$p.value,
              statistic = chi_result$statistic,
              n_obs = nrow(cov_data),
              contingency_table = contingency_table
            )
          }
        }
      })
      
      names(visit_tests) <- test_covariates
      
      list(
        visit = visit,
        tests = visit_tests,
        n_participants = n_distinct(cluster_visit_data$participant_id)
      )
    })
    
    names(cluster_tests_by_visit) <- unique_visits
  }
  
  # Continuar con el resto de la función original...
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # Quitar genes altamente correlacionados
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(., var = "sample_id")
  
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(
        covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id),
        by = "sample_id"
      )
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))
  
  # Transformar covariable si es factor o carácter binario
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Split train/test
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  # Validación cruzada
  ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = 3,
    repeats = 1,
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
    allowParallel = TRUE
  )
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )
  
  message("Entrenando modelo")
  set.seed(123)
  rf_model <- train(
    x = train_data %>% select(-cluster),
    y = train_data$cluster,
    method = "ranger",
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
  )
  
  # Predicciones
  test_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test_data)
  conf_matrix <- confusionMatrix(test_pred, test_data$cluster)
  
  if (is.matrix(conf_matrix$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(conf_matrix$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- conf_matrix$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }
  
  message("Entrenando modelos bootstraps")
  bootstrap_metrics <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                               .packages = c("ranger", "caret")) %dopar% {
                                 tryCatch({
                                   idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
                                   rf_boot <- ranger(
                                     formula = cluster ~ .,
                                     data = train_data[idx, ],
                                     mtry = rf_model$bestTune$mtry,
                                     num.trees = ntrees_select,
                                     importance = "permutation",
                                     always.split.variables = clinical_covar
                                   )
                                   pred <- predict(rf_boot, data = test_data)$predictions
                                   cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_data$cluster)
                                   bal_acc <- if (is.matrix(cm$byClass)) {
                                     mean(cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
                                   } else {
                                     cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
                                   }
                                   data.frame(
                                     Accuracy = cm$overall["Accuracy"],
                                     Kappa = cm$overall["Kappa"],
                                     BalancedAccuracy = bal_acc,
                                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE
                                   )
                                 }, error = function(e) {
                                   data.frame(Accuracy = NA, Kappa = NA, BalancedAccuracy = NA)
                                 })
                               }
  
  # Resultados finales
  list(
    Model = rf_model,
    ConfusionMatrix = conf_matrix,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapMetrics = bootstrap_metrics,
    BootstrapBalancedAccuracyMean = mean(bootstrap_metrics$BalancedAccuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    VariableImportance = varImp(rf_model)$importance,
    ClusterTestsByVisit = cluster_tests_by_visit,  # Nuevo: resultados por visita
    ClusterData = df_diff
  )
}





generate_cluster_tests_table <- function(cluster_tests_by_visit) {
  require(dplyr)
  require(purrr)
  require(tidyr)
  
  # Función para extraer información de cada test
  extract_test_info <- function(test_list, visit_name, cov_name) {
    if (is.null(test_list) || !is.list(test_list)) {
      return(data.frame(
        visit = visit_name,
        variable = cov_name,
        test = "No data",
        p_value = NA,
        statistic = NA,
        n_obs = 0,
        significance = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
    
    # Extraer información básica
    test_info <- data.frame(
      visit = visit_name,
      variable = cov_name,
      test = ifelse(!is.null(test_list$test), test_list$test, "Unknown"),
      p_value = ifelse(!is.null(test_list$p_value), test_list$p_value, NA),
      statistic = ifelse(!is.null(test_list$statistic), test_list$statistic, NA),
      n_obs = ifelse(!is.null(test_list$n_obs), test_list$n_obs, 0),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Añadir significancia estadística
    test_info$significance <- ifelse(is.na(test_info$p_value), NA,
                                    ifelse(test_info$p_value < 0.001, "***",
                                           ifelse(test_info$p_value < 0.01, "**",
                                                  ifelse(test_info$p_value < 0.05, "*", "NS"))))
    
    # Añadir información adicional para variables numéricas (medias por cluster)
    if (!is.null(test_list$means) && is.data.frame(test_list$means)) {
      means_summary <- test_list$means %>%
        mutate(mean_sd = sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f (n=%d)", mean, sd, n)) %>%
        group_by(cluster) %>%
        summarise(mean_sd = paste(mean_sd, collapse = ", "))
      
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(means_summary))) {
        cluster_name <- means_summary$cluster[i]
        mean_value <- means_summary$mean_sd[i]
        test_info[[paste0("cluster_", cluster_name)]] <- mean_value
      }
    }
    
    # Añadir información para variables categóricas (tabla de contingencia)
    if (!is.null(test_list$contingency_table)) {
      cont_table <- as.data.frame.matrix(test_list$contingency_table)
      cont_summary <- cont_table %>%
        rownames_to_column("cluster") %>%
        pivot_longer(cols = -cluster, names_to = "category", values_to = "count") %>%
        group_by(cluster) %>%
        summarise(distribution = paste(paste0(category, ":", count), collapse = "; "))
      
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(cont_summary))) {
        cluster_name <- cont_summary$cluster[i]
        dist_value <- cont_summary$distribution[i]
        test_info[[paste0("cluster_", cluster_name)]] <- dist_value
      }
    }
    
    return(test_info)
  }
  
  # Procesar todos los tests
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (visit_name in names(cluster_tests_by_visit)) {
    visit_data <- cluster_tests_by_visit[[visit_name]]
    
    if (!is.null(visit_data$tests)) {
      for (cov_name in names(visit_data$tests)) {
        test_data <- visit_data$tests[[cov_name]]
        test_info <- extract_test_info(test_data, visit_name, cov_name)
        results_list[[paste(visit_name, cov_name, sep = "_")]] <- test_info
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Combinar todos los resultados
  if (length(results_list) > 0) {
    results_table <- bind_rows(results_list) %>%
      arrange(visit, variable) %>%
      select(visit, variable, test, p_value, statistic, n_obs, significance, 
             everything()) %>%
      mutate(
        p_value = ifelse(is.na(p_value), NA, 
                        ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                               sprintf("%.3f", p_value))),
        statistic = ifelse(is.na(statistic), NA, 
                          ifelse(abs(statistic) > 1000, 
                                 sprintf("%.2e", statistic),
                                 sprintf("%.3f", statistic)))
      )
    
    # Renombrar columnas para mejor presentación
    colnames(results_table) <- gsub("cluster_", "Cluster ", colnames(results_table))
    
    return(results_table)
  } else {
    return(data.frame(
      message = "No hay datos de tests disponibles",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}




test_covs <- c(Motor, Non_Motor, "prognosis_status", "dementia_status", "apoe", "mapt", "AGE_ONSET", "upsit_total_score", "Tau", "Abeta", "upd23b_clinical_state_on_medication", "upd23a_medication_for_pd", "sex")
  
resultados <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = Covariates,
  test_covariates = test_covs,  # Covariables a testear
  percentile_column = "Motor_Score_raw_percentile",
  k = 2
)



# Ejemplo de uso:
tabla_resultados <- generate_cluster_tests_table(resultados$ClusterTestsByVisit)

datatable(tabla_resultados)






resultadosNM <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  covariates_data = Covariates,
  test_covariates = test_covs,  # Covariables a testear
  percentile_column = "Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile",
  k = 3
)



# Ejemplo de uso:
tabla_resultadosNM <- generate_cluster_tests_table(resultadosNM$ClusterTestsByVisit)

datatable(tabla_resultadosNM)


```




# Genes importantes para predecir progresión


## MOTOR
```{r}


# Asegúrate de que tiene el formato adecuado
var_imp <- results_NoCov$VariableImportance %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  # rownames_to_column(var = "Variable") %>%
  # rename(Importance = Overall) %>%
  arrange(desc(Importance))

# Puedes limitar a las N más importantes si quieres:
top_n <- 100
var_imp_top <- var_imp %>% slice_max(order_by = Importance, n = top_n)







# Configurar el mart para acceder a Ensembl
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")  # Cambia "hsapiens_gene_ensembl" si trabajas con otra especie

# Obtener el mapa de Ensembl IDs a Gene Symbols
ensembl_ids <- var_imp_top$Variable
gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                  values = ensembl_ids,
                  mart = ensembl)

# Crear un vector con los nuevos nombres
new_genes <- sapply(ensembl_ids, function(id) {
  symbol <- gene_map$hgnc_symbol[match(id, gene_map$ensembl_gene_id)]
  ifelse(symbol != "" & !is.na(symbol), symbol, id)  # Usa el símbolo si existe, si no, conserva el Ensembl ID
})

# Asignar los nuevos rownames a countData
var_imp_top$Variable <- new_genes






# Gráfico
VarImp_top <- ggplot(var_imp_top, aes(x = reorder(Variable, Importance), y = Importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +  # Tamaño base general
  labs(
    title = paste("Top", top_n, "Variable Importances"),
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Importance"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6))  # Tamaño específico para las etiquetas del eje y





# Asegúrate de que el gráfico está creado y se llama `volcano_plot`
ggsave(
  filename = "VarImp_k2.png",  # Nombre del archivo
  plot = VarImp_top,                       # Objeto ggplot
  device = "png",                            # Formato (también puede ser "pdf", "tiff", etc.)
  width = 10,                                # Ancho (en pulgadas)
  height = 8,                                # Alto (en pulgadas)
  units = "in",                              # Unidades ("in", "cm", "mm")
  dpi = 300,                                 # Resolución (300 dpi para alta calidad)
  bg = "white"                               # Fondo blanco (útil para PNG)
)





PPMI_exp_M0_ImpGenes_50 <- PPMI_exp_M0[, var_imp %>% filter(Importance >= 50) %>% pull(Variable)]

PPMI_exp_M0_ImpGenes_75 <- PPMI_exp_M0[, var_imp %>% filter(Importance >= 75) %>% pull(Variable)]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}

boot_50 <- results_ImpGenes_50$BootstrapMetrics
boot_75 <- results_ImpGenes_75$BootstrapMetrics




boot_50$Modelo <- 50
boot_75$Modelo <- 75


boot_50$Grupo <- "15 genes"
boot_75$Grupo <- "2 genes"


boot_all_genes_sel <- rbind(
 boot_50,
 boot_75
)


# Genes + clínica
pvals_genes_sel <- data.frame(
  Modelo = c(
    # "NoCovariate",
    50,
    75
    ),
  AccuracyPValue = c(
    results_ImpGenes_50$ConfusionMatrix$overall["AccuracyPValue"],
    results_ImpGenes_75$ConfusionMatrix$overall["AccuracyPValue"]
  )
)

pvals_genes_sel$PValueLabel <- paste0("p = ", signif(pvals_genes_sel$AccuracyPValue, 3))


max_bal_acc <- aggregate(BalancedAccuracy ~ Modelo + Grupo, data=boot_all_genes_sel, max)
label_df <- merge(max_bal_acc, pvals_genes_sel, by="Modelo")
label_df$LabelY <- label_df$BalancedAccuracy + 0.02


plot_balanced <- ggplot(boot_all_genes_sel, aes(x=Modelo, y=BalancedAccuracy, fill=Grupo)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.85, position=position_dodge(width=0.9)) +
  geom_text(
    data=label_df,
    aes(x=Modelo, y=LabelY, label=PValueLabel, group=Grupo),
    size=2.2,
    vjust=0,
    position=position_dodge(width=0.9)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=15) +
  labs(
    title="Balanced Accuracy in Patient Progression Prediction Using Key Gene Sets",
    x="VarImp threshold",
    y="Balanced Accuracy"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set2", name = "Gene Set size") +
  theme(
    legend.position="bottom",
    plot.title=element_text(face="bold"),
    axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1, vjust=0.5, size=6),
    axis.text.y=element_text(size=12),
    axis.title=element_text(size=14),
    legend.text=element_text(size=12)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1))


ggsave(
  filename = "BalancedAccuracy_Models_k2_GenesImp.png",
  plot = plot_balanced,
  width = 16,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)







max_acc <- aggregate(Accuracy ~ Modelo + Grupo, data=boot_all_genes_sel, max)

)
```

# Expresión diferencial de genes

## MOTOR

###  Generar dataset con transcriptómica, clínica y variable objetivo (clusters de progresión)

```{r}


genes_pred_prog <- var_imp$Variable

# We need the raw counts instead of the VST:
PPMI_raw_counts <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "1aFase_ReducirGenes", "PPMI_exp")) %>% 
  rownames_to_column(.data = ., "sample_id") %>%
  filter(sample_id %in% rownames(PPMI_exp_M0)) %>% 
  select(all_of(c("sample_id", genes_pred_prog)))



# Para el análisis de expresion diferencial cogemos solo los genes y las etiquetas motor

genes_motor <- Covariates_clusterMotor %>%
  select(sample_id, cluster_motor, visit_name) %>%
  inner_join(
    PPMI_raw_counts,
    by = "sample_id"
  )


```


### Grupos vs Resto

```{r}

# Definir las visitas que deseas incluir en el análisis
visitas_seleccionadas <- c("M0")  # Puedes incluir "M12", "M24", "M36" si lo deseas

# Filtrar los datos para las visitas seleccionadas
genes_motor_filtrado <- genes_motor[genes_motor$visit_name %in% visitas_seleccionadas, ]

# Asegurar que cluster_motor sea factor
genes_motor_filtrado$cluster_motor <- factor(genes_motor_filtrado$cluster_motor)

# Extraer matriz de conteos
countData <- t(as.matrix(genes_motor_filtrado[, 4:ncol(genes_motor_filtrado)]))
countData <- as.matrix(countData)

# Crear el objeto DESeqDataSet
dds_motor <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = countData,
  colData = genes_motor_filtrado[, c("sample_id", "cluster_motor")],
  design = ~ cluster_motor
)

# Ejecutar DESeq
dds_motor <- DESeq(dds_motor)

# Comparar cluster 1 vs 2
res_motor <- results(dds_motor, contrast = c("cluster_motor", "1", "2"))

# Convertir a data.frame y añadir etiquetas de sobreexpresión
res_df <- as.data.frame(res_motor) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(
    significant = ifelse(
      padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5, "DEG", "No DEG"
    ),
    overexpressed_in = case_when(
      log2FoldChange > 0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ "Cluster 1",
      log2FoldChange < -0.5 & padj < 0.05 ~ "Cluster 2",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    )
  )

# ---- Top 10 DEGs ----
library(ggrepel)
top_deg_labels <- res_df %>%
  filter(significant == "DEG") %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 10)

# ---- Traducir Ensembl → Gene Symbol ----
library("biomaRt")
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

ensembl_ids <- top_deg_labels$gene
gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                  values = ensembl_ids,
                  mart = ensembl)

top_deg_labels_symbol <- top_deg_labels %>%
  left_join(gene_map, by = c("gene" = "ensembl_gene_id")) %>%
  mutate(gene = ifelse(hgnc_symbol == "", gene, hgnc_symbol)) %>%
  select(-hgnc_symbol)

# ---- Volcano plot ----
volcano_plot <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = overexpressed_in), alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Cluster 1" = "red",
    "Cluster 2" = "blue",
    "None" = "gray"
  )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_deg_labels_symbol,
    aes(label = gene),
    color = "black",
    size = 3,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    max.overlaps = 100,
    segment.color = "grey50"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DEGs between motor progression clusters (M0)",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change (Cluster 1 vs 2)",
    y = "-Log10(padj)",
    color = "Overexpressed in"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(volcano_plot)



# Asegúrate de que el gráfico está creado y se llama `volcano_plot`
ggsave(
  filename = "VolcanoPlot_k2.png",  # Nombre del archivo
  plot = volcano_plot,                       # Objeto ggplot
  device = "png",                            # Formato (también puede ser "pdf", "tiff", etc.)
  width = 10,                                # Ancho (en pulgadas)
  height = 8,                                # Alto (en pulgadas)
  units = "in",                              # Unidades ("in", "cm", "mm")
  dpi = 300,                                 # Resolución (300 dpi para alta calidad)
  bg = "white"                               # Fondo blanco (útil para PNG)
)





# Extraer lista de genes DEG
genes_DEG_Motor <- res_df %>%
  filter(significant == "DEG") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%                # opcional: ordenar por significancia
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange, padj)


# saveRDS(genes_DEG_Motor, "genes_DEG_Motor")

readRDS("genes_DEG_Motor")





# Upset plot:

# Extraer genes del enfoque NO LINEAL (Random Forest)
genes_rf <- var_imp_top$Variable  # Asumiendo que 'Variable' contiene los nombres de genes
# Si no se llama 'Variable', ajusta según el nombre real de tu columna

# Extraer genes del enfoque LINEAL (DESeq2)
genes_de <- res_df %>%
  filter(significant == "DEG") %>%
  pull(gene)

# Si quieres ser más específico con los DEG:
# genes_de_strict <- res_df %>%
#   filter(padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1) %>%  # Umbral más estricto
#   pull(gene)
# 
# 


library(UpSetR)
library(tidyverse)

# Crear la lista de conjuntos
gene_lists <- list(
  RandomForest = genes_rf,
  DEG = genes_de  # DEG = Differentially Expressed Genes
)

# Upset Plot básico
upset_plot <- upset(fromList(gene_lists),
                    nsets = length(gene_lists),
                    nintersects = 20,  # Mostrar hasta 20 intersecciones
                    order.by = "freq",
                    mainbar.y.label = "NNumber of Genes",
                    sets.x.label = "Genes per approach",
                    point.size = 3.5,
                    line.size = 1,
                    mb.ratio = c(0.6, 0.4),
                    text.scale = c(1.3, 1.3, 1, 1, 1.5, 1))

print(upset_plot)





# Crear matriz más detallada para mejor control
list_input <- list(
  RandomForest = genes_rf,
  DEG_all = genes_de,
  DEG_cluster1 = res_df %>% filter(overexpressed_in == "Cluster 1") %>% pull(gene),
  DEG_cluster2 = res_df %>% filter(overexpressed_in == "Cluster 2") %>% pull(gene)
)

# Upset Plot avanzado
upset(fromList(list_input),
      nsets = 4,
      nintersects = 15,
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Number of Genes",
      sets.x.label = "Total genes per approach",
      sets.bar.color = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3"),
      matrix.color = "black",
      text.scale = c(1.5, 1.3, 1, 1, 1.5, 1))




```






### Volcanos con gene names 

```{r eval=FALSE}



var_imp_top_50Imp <- var_imp_top_Motor %>% dplyr::filter(Importance >= 50)



res_motor <- results(dds_motor, contrast = c("cluster_motor", "1", "2"))


# Convertir a data.frame y eliminar NAs
res_df <- as.data.frame(res_motor) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(
    significant = ifelse(
      padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5, 
      "DEG", 
      "No DEG"
    )
  )


# Primero, creamos una columna adicional en res_df para identificar estos genes especiales
res_df <- res_df %>%
  mutate(
    special_genes = ifelse(
      gene %in% var_imp_top_50Imp$Variable, 
      "Important", 
      ifelse(significant == "DEG", "DEG", "No DEG")
    )
  )

# Asegurarnos que los DEGs siguen teniendo prioridad
res_df$special_genes <- ifelse(
  res_df$significant == "DEG" & res_df$special_genes == "Important",
  "DEG_and_Important",
  res_df$special_genes
)

# Crear el data frame para las etiquetas (DEGs y genes importantes)
labels_df <- res_df %>% 
  dplyr::filter(special_genes %in% c("DEG", "Important", "DEG_and_Important"))



# Traducir los nombres de ensembl a gene symbol

# Configurar el mart para acceder a Ensembl
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")  # Cambia "hsapiens_gene_ensembl" si trabajas con otra especie

# Obtener el mapa de Ensembl IDs a Gene Symbols
ensembl_ids <- labels_df$gene
gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                  values = ensembl_ids,
                  mart = ensembl)

# Crear un vector con los nuevos nombres
new_genes <- sapply(ensembl_ids, function(id) {
  symbol <- gene_map$hgnc_symbol[match(id, gene_map$ensembl_gene_id)]
  ifelse(symbol != "" & !is.na(symbol), symbol, id)  # Usa el símbolo si existe, si no, conserva el Ensembl ID
})

# Asignar los nuevos rownames a countData
labels_df$gene <- new_genes



# Crear el Volcano Plot
volcano_plot <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = special_genes)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "DEG" = "coral2", 
      "Important" = "steelblue3", 
      "DEG_and_Important" = "purple",
      "No DEG" = "gray"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "DEG" = "Significant DEG", 
      "Important" = "Variable Importance > 50", 
      "DEG_and_Important" = "DEG + Top Variable",
      "No DEG" = "Not significant"
    )
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  # Añadir etiquetas para DEGs y genes importantes
  geom_text_repel(
    data = labels_df,
    aes(label = gene),
    color = "black",
    size = 1,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    max.overlaps = 100,
    segment.color = "grey50",
    segment.size = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DEGs between motor progression clusters",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change",
    y = "-Log10(p-value adj)",
    color = "Gene Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# Mostrar el plot
print(volcano_plot)




# Asegúrate de que el gráfico está creado y se llama `volcano_plot`
ggsave(
  filename = "VolcanoPlot_k2_Imp.png",  # Nombre del archivo
  plot = volcano_plot,                       # Objeto ggplot
  device = "png",                            # Formato (también puede ser "pdf", "tiff", etc.)
  width = 10,                                # Ancho (en pulgadas)
  height = 8,                                # Alto (en pulgadas)
  units = "in",                              # Unidades ("in", "cm", "mm")
  dpi = 300,                                 # Resolución (300 dpi para alta calidad)
  bg = "white"                               # Fondo blanco (útil para PNG)
)





```



### Lista de DEG

```{r eval=FALSE}

# Obtener todos los DEGs (incluyendo "DEG" y "DEG_and_Important")
deg_list <- res_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(significant == "DEG") %>%  # Filtra solo DEGs
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange, padj, special_genes) %>%  # Selecciona columnas relevantes
  arrange(padj)  # Ordenar por p-valor ajustado (opcional)

# Ver los primeros genes DEG
head(deg_list)


# Obtener símbolos (usando el mapeo previo)
deg_symbols <- deg_list %>%
  left_join(gene_map, by = c("gene" = "ensembl_gene_id")) %>%  # Unir con el mapeo de símbolos
  mutate(gene_name = ifelse(!is.na(hgnc_symbol) & hgnc_symbol != "", hgnc_symbol, gene)) %>%  # Usar símbolo o ID
  dplyr::select(gene_name, log2FoldChange, padj, special_genes)

# Mostrar la lista completa
print(deg_symbols)


write.csv(deg_symbols$gene_name, file = "lista_DEGs_motor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


## NO MOTOR

###  Generar dataset con transcriptómica, clínica y variable objetivo (clusters de progresión)

```{r}


genes_pred_prog <- var_imp_Non_Motor$Variable

# We need the raw counts instead of the VST:
# PPMI_raw_counts <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "1aFase_ReducirGenes", "PPMI_exp")) %>% 
#   rownames_to_column(.data = ., "sample_id") %>%
#   filter(sample_id %in% rownames(PPMI_exp_M0)) %>% 
#   select(all_of(c("sample_id", genes_pred_prog)))



# Para el análisis de expresion diferencial cogemos solo los genes y las etiquetas motor

genes_non_motor <- Covariates_clusterNonMotor %>%
  select(sample_id, cluster_non_motor, visit_name) %>%
  inner_join(
    PPMI_raw_counts,
    by = "sample_id"
  )


```


### Grupos vs Resto

```{r}


# Definir las visitas que deseas incluir en el análisis
visitas_seleccionadas <- c("M0")#, "M12", "M24", "M36")  # Ejemplo, puedes cambiar estos nombres por las visitas que necesites

# Filtrar los datos para las visitas seleccionadas
genes_non_motor_filtrado <- genes_non_motor[genes_non_motor$visit_name %in% visitas_seleccionadas, ]

# Asegúrate de que cluster_non_motor y cluster_non_non_motor sean factores en los datos filtrados
genes_non_motor_filtrado$cluster_non_motor <- factor(genes_non_motor_filtrado$cluster_non_motor)

# Extraer la matriz de conteos solo para las visitas seleccionadas
countData <- t(as.matrix(genes_non_motor_filtrado[, 4:ncol(genes_non_motor_filtrado)]))



library("biomaRt")

# Traducir los nombres de ensembl a gene symbol

# Configurar el mart para acceder a Ensembl
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")  # Cambia "hsapiens_gene_ensembl" si trabajas con otra especie

# Obtener el mapa de Ensembl IDs a Gene Symbols
ensembl_ids <- rownames(countData)
gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
                  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                  values = ensembl_ids,
                  mart = ensembl)

# Crear un vector con los nuevos nombres
new_rownames <- sapply(ensembl_ids, function(id) {
  symbol <- gene_map$hgnc_symbol[match(id, gene_map$ensembl_gene_id)]
  ifelse(symbol != "" & !is.na(symbol), symbol, id)  # Usa el símbolo si existe, si no, conserva el Ensembl ID
})

# Asignar los nuevos rownames a countData
rownames(countData) <- new_rownames

# Reconvertir a matriz para DESeq2
countData <- as.matrix(countData)



# Crear el objeto DESeqDataSet para cluster_non_motor, incluyendo las visitas como variables dummy
dds_non_motor <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = countData,
                                    colData = genes_non_motor_filtrado[, c("sample_id", "cluster_non_motor")],
                                    design = ~ cluster_non_motor)

# Ejecutar el análisis DESeq para cluster_non_motor
dds_non_motor <- DESeq(dds_non_motor)



# --- Definir comparaciones agrupadas ---
colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_grouped <- as.character(colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_non_motor)

# Generar etiquetas combinadas
colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_grouped_1v23 <- ifelse(colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_non_motor == "1", "1", "2+3")
colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_grouped_2v13 <- ifelse(colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_non_motor == "2", "2", "1+3")
colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_grouped_3v12 <- ifelse(colData(dds_non_motor)$cluster_non_motor == "3", "3", "1+2")

# Función auxiliar para DESeq y resultados
get_DEGs <- function(dds, group_var, contrast, label){
  dds_tmp <- dds
  colData(dds_tmp)$grp <- factor(colData(dds_tmp)[[group_var]])
  design(dds_tmp) <- ~ grp
  dds_tmp <- DESeq(dds_tmp)
  
  res <- results(dds_tmp, contrast = c("grp", contrast[1], contrast[2]))
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    mutate(
      comparison = label,
      significant = ifelse(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5, TRUE, FALSE)
    )
  return(res_df)
}

# Obtener resultados para cada comparación
res_1v23 <- get_DEGs(dds_non_motor, "cluster_grouped_1v23", c("1","2+3"), "1 vs 2+3")
res_2v13 <- get_DEGs(dds_non_motor, "cluster_grouped_2v13", c("2","1+3"), "2 vs 1+3")
res_3v12 <- get_DEGs(dds_non_motor, "cluster_grouped_3v12", c("3","1+2"), "3 vs 1+2")

# Unir resultados
res_all <- bind_rows(res_1v23, res_2v13, res_3v12)

res_all %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  summarise(
    n_significant = sum(significant, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_total = n()
  )

# Volcano superpuesto (solo DEGs coloreados)
volcano_plot <- ggplot(res_all, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = comparison), data = res_all %>% filter(significant), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(data = res_all %>% filter(!significant), color = "gray70", alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Non-Motor Volcano Plot",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change",
    y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )

# Seleccionar top 10 por comparación según |log2FoldChange|
top_labels <- res_all %>%
  filter(significant) %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 10)

volcano_plot <- volcano_plot +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_labels,
                  aes(label = gene, color = comparison),
                  size = 3, max.overlaps = 30)

print(volcano_plot)

# Guardar en alta calidad
ggsave(
  filename = "NonMotor_VolcanoPlot.png",
  plot = volcano_plot,
  device = "png",
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)



# Extraer lista de genes DEG
genes_DEG_NonMotor <- res_all %>%
  filter(significant) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange, padj, comparison)

# saveRDS(genes_DEG_NonMotor, "genes_DEG_NonMotor")

readRDS("genes_DEG_NonMotor")












# --- 1️⃣ Ejecutar comparaciones ya existentes ---
# (asumo que ya tienes: res_1v23, res_2v13, res_3v12, y res_all)

# --- 2️⃣ Filtrar genes significativos por comparación ---
genes_sig_1 <- res_1v23 %>%
  filter(significant, log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

genes_sig_2 <- res_2v13 %>%
  filter(significant, log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

genes_sig_3 <- res_3v12 %>%
  filter(significant, log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
  pull(gene)

# --- 3️⃣ Crear una lista nombrada de genes sobreexpresados ---
list_up_genes <- list(
  "Cluster 1" = genes_sig_1,
  "Cluster 2" = genes_sig_2,
  "Cluster 3" = genes_sig_3
)

# --- 4️⃣ UpSet plot: visualizar intersecciones ---
library(UpSetR)

upset(fromList(list_up_genes),
      order.by = "freq",
      nintersects = NA,
      sets.bar.color = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A"),
      main.bar.color = "gray40",
      matrix.color = "black",
      keep.order = TRUE,
      mainbar.y.label = "Shared DEGs (log2FC > 0, padj < 0.05)",
      sets.x.label = "DEGs per Cluster",
      text.scale = c(1.3, 1.3, 1, 1, 1.2, 1.2))

# --- 5️⃣ Volcano plot combinado (ya adaptado a res_all) ---
library(ggrepel)

volcano_plot <- ggplot(res_all, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = comparison), data = res_all %>% filter(significant), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(data = res_all %>% filter(!significant), color = "gray70", alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Non-Motor Volcano Plot",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change",
    y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )

# Top genes para etiquetar
top_labels <- res_all %>%
  filter(significant) %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 10)

volcano_plot <- volcano_plot +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_labels,
                  aes(label = gene, color = comparison),
                  size = 3, max.overlaps = 30)

print(volcano_plot)

# Genes exclusivos de Cluster 1
exclusive_1 <- setdiff(genes_sig_1, union(genes_sig_2, genes_sig_3))

# Genes comunes a 1 y 3
shared_13 <- intersect(genes_sig_1, genes_sig_3)

# Genes exclusivos de Cluster 3
exclusive_3 <- setdiff(genes_sig_3, union(genes_sig_1, genes_sig_2))










# Genes del enfoque NO LINEAL (Random Forest)
genes_rf <- var_imp_top_NonMotor$Variable
# Si no, ajusta según tu estructura real

# Genes del enfoque LINEAL (DESeq2) - Separar por comparación
genes_de_1v23 <- res_1v23 %>% filter(significant == TRUE) %>% pull(gene)
genes_de_2v13 <- res_2v13 %>% filter(significant == TRUE) %>% pull(gene)  
genes_de_3v12 <- res_3v12 %>% filter(significant == TRUE) %>% pull(gene)

# Todos los DEGs únicos (sin duplicados entre comparaciones)
genes_de_all <- unique(c(genes_de_1v23, genes_de_2v13, genes_de_3v12))

library(UpSetR)

# Lista básica métodos
gene_lists_methods <- list(
  RandomForest = genes_rf,
  DEG_1v23 = genes_de_1v23,
  DEG_2v13 = genes_de_2v13,
  DEG_3v12 = genes_de_3v12
)

# Upset Plot métodos
upset(fromList(gene_lists_methods),
      nsets = 4,
      nintersects = 15,
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Number of Genes",
      sets.x.label = "Total Genes per approach",
      sets.bar.color = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3"),
      text.scale = c(1.3, 1.2, 1, 1, 1.4, 1))






```

```{r eval=FALSE}
var_imp_top_50Imp <- var_imp %>% dplyr::filter(Importance >= 50)



res_non_motor <- results(dds_non_motor, contrast = c("cluster_non_motor", "1", "2"))


# Convertir a data.frame y eliminar NAs

})

    )
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +

  # Añadir etiquetas para DEGs y genes importantes
  geom_text_repel(
    data = labels_df,
    aes(label = gene),
    color = "black",
    size = 1,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    max.overlaps = 100,
    segment.color = "grey50",
    segment.size = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DEGs between non_motor progression clusters",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change",
    y = "-Log10(p-value adj)",

  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# Mostrar el plot

# Asegúrate de que el gráfico está creado y se llama `volcano_plot`
```
